reviews.text: Outstanding attorney. So grateful she represented me in my divorce.  Highly recommend

Highly Recommend, exceptional Support beyond divorce and custody.
I can't recommend this lawyer enough. Not only did Christy handle my divorce and child custody case with expertise and compassion, but she also went above and beyond after a serious incident involving my ex-husband and my son. Her dedication, responsiveness, and genuine concern for my family's safety and well-being truly set her apart. If you're looking for someone who will stand by you and fight for what's right, she is the lawyer you want on your side.
Christy is wonderful to work with, honest, hard working, and I would highly recommend as an family law attorney.
Not only was helpful but was very down to earth and easy to talk to. Can't thank you enough.

I can't say enough good things about Christy and her assistant, Lauren. I have been going through a very adversarial family law case with a lot of ups and downs for several years. Prior to retaining The Carlisle Law Firm, I had two previous attorneys. The first attorney did the bare minimum (retained using my employer sponsored legal insurance) which did not help progress the case at all, and the second attorney actually stalled the progress of the case by alternating between giving poor/haphazard legal advice and being non responsive.

I was beyond stressed out and knew I had to make a switch, regardless of the cost. As soon as I contacted Christy for a consultation, she listened to my story and gave me realistic expectations and timelines.

Since retaining Christy, the case has swiftly moved forward with no major road blocks. She is extremely intelligent, professional, prompt, friendly, firm, and an overall wonderful attorney to work with. Lauren is extremely responsive, friendly, and professional. They both put my mind at ease and addressed all of my concerns in a timely manner. Her cost is very fair, given the excellent services she provides.

We were able to go from a huge mess of a case to a fair resolution within 7 months (VERY quick turn-around given the history of the case).

I highly recommend this law firm to anyone who needs a strong family law attorney! Thank you, Christy and Lauren. You played a major part helping my life return to normalcy!
She can handle narcissists …

If you are looking to hire a family law lawyer, then you must absolutely hire Christy Carlisle!
I worked with Christy for over 2 years and she helped me through a very difficult custody, child support, and divorce case. She was always compassionate, sensitive, and understanding! She knows family law inside and out; everything from domestic violence to adoptions. I always appreciated how honest she was with me and would tell me her professional opinion on steps we should take. She has a passion for what she does, which is helping people navigate one of the hardest times a person can go through.
I couldn’t have done my case without her! She is truly one of a kind in the field of family law.
Christy cares about families and it shows.  I would recommend her to anyone she is wins!

Christy Carlisle is hands down the best attorney I have worked with! She genuinely cared about who she represents and will fight for your child like it’s her own. She’s professional and down to earth. Kind and compassionate and she’ll tell you straight. She won’t take on your case unless she thinks she can help you. Unlike other lawyers who will take you on as a client to take your money.  I have spent THOUSANDS AND THOUSANDS of dollars on lawyers in my custody battle and none of them cared about my child. They were money hungry and made promises that they couldn’t deliver. After giving up on finding a good lawyer to help me protect my child, I found Christy and the Carlisle Law Firm. I’m forever grateful that I did. My family will be clients for life.

Christy is beyond amazing! She is extremely knowledgeable and honest. She will definitely tell you like it is and not waste your time. She fights very hard for her clients and is a savage in the court room. I highly recommend her!
Christy is a amazing lawyer, I would recommend her to anyone.
The team at The Carlisle Law Firm was very professional and courteous handling my case.  Clear communication when needed not a lot of wasted time. Positive outcome, highly recommended

I had a free consultation with Ms. Carlisle today regarding my custody issue with my 14 year old son. I have never consulted with an attorney that gave me “raw” information. Meaning that she advised me of the court of law’s view and the code section of the law to research to assist me in my case.

Additionally, her professional demeanor was very soothing/calming to hear while being in this intense/stressful situation. I would highly recommend Ms. Carlisle to do my family law case! If she did this consult for free, imagine what she can do for you if you hired her!

Great attorney! I had dealt with some in the past, and let me tell you, Robert exceeded my expectations. He ensures that you as a client understand the process and what you are about to sign. Some people prefer not to know that and have their attorney "take care of it". That was me some years ago, and I didn't realize that my attorney just ensured that the process went through its' completion, which was not necessarily in my best interests. On your behalf Robert stays on top of the timeline, he is always there to advise, and you are not afraid to call, text, or email him and be charged a fee. I would recommend him without any reservations!

Robert Sanders helped incorporate my medical practice. I have no background with legal matters, but Robert made things understandable. He is knowledgeable, professional, and dependable. He is also prompt and communicative, often responding to emails immediately. I would recommend Robert for your professional needs.
Highly recommended.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much.  It was a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: Readjusting this post.  I mistook Mr. Sander for another that I attempted to call.  Mr. Sanders responded quickly and appropriately to my email, which I appreciated.  He explained what I needed to do in order to move forward with a contract I had questions.
reviews.ownerResponse: David, I make it a point to call back everyone who leaves me a voicemail.  I reviewed all of my voicemails over the past month and I cannot find a record of your call.  Nonetheless, I am sorry if your message fell through the cracks somehow.  I hope you were able to find the legal help you were looking for.  - Robert

reviews.text: I have used Robert Sanders for incorporating my 2 companies and selling one of my businesses. He is wonderful to work with and I recommend  him to all my friends.

His fees are very reasonable, especially if you place an emphasis on prevention of negative legal consequences.

If you are like me, you don’t think about hiring a lawyer until you need one. My advice is to get to know Robert Sanders before you need legal representation. Robert is honest, fair and is an extraordinary bright attorney who is fantastic to work with.

reviews.text: My wife and I had the pleasure of having Brandon update our old Estate Plan. We wanted to make sure all of our documents were in line with our wishes now that we had more children. Brandon was patient and easy to work with. His team is professional and prompt in responding to our questions. I recommend many of my friends to BJS Law and will continue to do so.

I can't say enough positive things about my experience with this law firm. Brandon not only has ethics & morals, but he is honest & extremely reasonable. In speaking with other business owners, I have found that the ones who know him have the same experiences and recommendations. Brandon really made this difficult time easier. I highly recommend him!!!

Brandon is a knowledgeable expert in every way! I feel fortunate to have learned about his services in setting up trusts and also learned he has a background in real estate. As a single mom, this was extremely helpful as I wanted to ensure the new home I bought was set up for my children to inherit one day and that they are cared for as much as possible.

It's rare to find someone like Brandon who understands both real estate and law so deeply, while offering practical advice alongside years of expertise. The best part about Brandon is that he makes the process of setting up a trust less intimidating by generously sharing his knowledge. He is trustworthy, kind and up front about everything you should consider while laying out your future plans to protect your assets and family. His process is seamless and I have no doubt you will enjoy working with him.
Brandon is very professional and easy to work with. He is helping me with multiple legal and real estate projects and I’m very happy with his services.
Brandon is diligent, thorough and honest. From the consultation on he offers great insight and puts himself in your shoes when offering advice.
Brandon is extremely knowledgeable, professional, and thorough. He helped our family set up a trust in no time. Don’t delay!

We're very pleased with Todd and his team helping us to resolve my husband's case. Bissell Law Corporation promptly addressed all issues. We highly recommend Bissell Law corporation to anyone in need of advocacy.

Todd has been So Great with Knowledge and Input. He's always very patient with my questions. He takes his time to explain all of the little details so I understand my options. I would recommend him Highly!

Todd is an honest man. He helped me through a car accident with proper filing, legal advice, etc. and he has always kept it honest about what my options were and what the realest solutions were. He’s not another lawyer who’s just trying to make a quick buck.

I called Bissell Law Group, and I was very satisfied with the end result of my legal journey.

I asked a lot of questions, as I was very foggy after my car wreck, Todd Bissell always was  patient as well as responsive to all my phone calls & emails, and walked me through each step of my injury case.

Glad I was able to get the results I needed!

Highly recommend Bissell Law!!

Thank you Todd!!

Lisa
very professional, quick and highly efficient Law Group
Very friendly and helpful!

I was driving to work and was hit head on. Todd helped me after my auto accident. I was in a wheelchair and couldn't work or help my wife with the kids. Todd took all the stress of dealing with the insurance companies away. I knew very shortly after the accident what I was intitled to and everything was handled leaving me to worry about my rehab. It was perfect. After everything Todd took less than his share of the settlement to help me out. Words can't describe my gratitude. Awesome guy.

Todd is truley a Caring guy. I called him not knowing him what so ever. I found him thru the internet, after I had been Rear ended at a high speed. He has really kept me going in the right direction, as to my health care, as well as advice. My claim hasn't been settled yet, however he's been fighting for me this far, so I put a full 100% of confidence in him to get me back my lost wages ECT.

I am a former law enforcement officer who has disabled on the job years ago.  When I got into a recent car accident, the other driver's insurance company tried to blame my injuries and treatment on my old disability.  Todd was able to schedule a meeting with me and the insurance adjuster for the other driver who came to Todd's office to hear our side of the case.  Todd persuaded the adjuster that my injuries were from the recent car crash.  Shortly after that meeting, Todd secured for me a settlement higher than I had ever expected in the hundreds of thousands of dollars.  Todd did not quit then.  He continued to work on the case for free, and negotiated with my health insurance company who wanted to be reimbursed for the car-accident bills that they had paid.  Todd convinced them to accept a very small sum, which put tens of thousands of dollars more into my pocket.  Thanks Todd for all your hard work. Duane S. Folsom, CA

I have been in three accidents over 21 years and have had Todd represent me in all of them.  The first one was in 1989, and Todd did such a fine job that I returned to him in 1994.  In that accident, Todd recovered for me a policy-limit settlement in excess of $100,000.  My most-recent accident was in 2010.  That accident involved my being hit by a criminal who was fleeing the home that he had just robbed.  He was being chased, and crashed into me.  That 2011 settlement for me was more than a quarter of a million dollars!  I have recommended Todd to friends and will return to him if I ever get hit again. Dabney L. North Highlands, CA

Jason and Janet Ewing are an amazing team working together seamlessly. Ewing Law Group in my opinion is the best and they are honest and aside being attorney's Jason and Janet Ewing are amazing people.

Thank you Jason and Janet Ewing
Chris McCay

I wouldn’t have had it any other way!  Janet Ewing was my choice for a divorce attorney and she did an awesome job.  Always available to answer my emails In a timely manner and explained things to me as they happened.  Janet had to put up with nonsense from the opposing side and she did so with ease.  My case took a reasonable amount of time to settle and in the end, Janet and Jason were an awesome team and saved me some money!!!  You guys rock and if I ever need legal services in the future I will be calling you!  I highly recommend the Ewing Law Group for your legal needs!

Wonderful service! Above and beyond! If you need a good, honest, and compassionate lawyer this is the one. Everything is fair and he does way more in terms of value and services (does not nickel and dime you like other attorneys). Being a single father it's wonderful working with someone who knows the ins and outs of the law and meets with you on a one-on-one basis. You will get first-rate service and he does not pass your case to one of his other workers like other attornies do when they are a huge firm.
I spoke to Mr. Ewing and he was very helpful in assisting me with this divorce.

Though this is my first (and hopefully last) divorce, Janet was the best choice when it comes to legal counsel.  I'll be honest, I called a couple of other attorneys first.  One sounded extremely rude and hard pressed for time.  They told me how much it would be up front and gave a very grim outlook.  The other sounded like they were too busy to take on another case.
Janet welcomed my call and took the time to listen to my concerns.  She made me feel extremely comfortable and answered all of my questions.
During the proceedings, she was extremely communicative and kept me posted on any/ all updates.

If I ever get left for my husbands best friend again, I will be sure to call Janet. Amazing Attorney!

Very knowledgeable and professional. I obtained Mr. Ewing services and I have had nothing but positive experiences. Mr. Ewing has gone above and beyond to help me with my cases and keep me informed. He has replied to all emails, phone calls, texts etc. In a timely manner and has been very patient with me and very informative. I definitely recommend Ewing Law Group for anyone looking for a knowledgeable, professional Lawyer who is gonna always have your best interests in mind.

I was not happy with the detail that was taken in my case. There were several items overlooked, and it cost me a chunk of money. I felt like they were in a hurry to settle and get it over with. I was never reassured by them. It felt like they were working for the other party most of the time. They were not clear on explaining the details on decisions I had to make. They kept throwing in my face that I was about out of hours. I think this was to get me to settle. I lost a lot because of this law group. They made me feel on guard the entire time. They have no fight or bite. I would not recommend them to anyone. Maybe if your kindergarten child stubs their toe.
I understand I had a legal group contract, but I still should've been represented better.                                   I found out a few months ago more things they missed. That mistake cost me around 80k+. So much overlooked. Move on use your money wisely with a real law firm.

Janet Ewing is the best. I highly recommend her service for anyone who is looking for an attorney. Janet went above and beyond in settling my nasty divorce case. I like the fact that Janet was always on top of things. She was quick to respond to my emails and with filing& forwarding paperworks. To me, I find that Janet is an honest attorney. So honest that she was willingly to forward me her dialogue between her and the other counsel to inform/reassure me the status & updates of my case when asked. She's an awesome attorney so thank you Janet. I will be seeing you again with future legal matters.

First meeting with Jason was all about selling himself and always being available. However that was not the case. I’ve waited over a month just to get a response. I have had to send several emails just to get the papers I needed and should have been sent when he received them and not several weeks later when it is too late. Literally had to send up to seven emails just to get a response and an update. Each email subject line reading “First attempt to get papers”, “second attempt to get papers” and so on. Once confronted about lack of communication and how poorly this is being handled all of a sudden the communication begins. But basically it was the blame game. Everything was everybody else’s fault. It was my fault I sent a screen shot of an email that had questions he wasn’t answering which resulted in him missing new questions. It was the other attorneys fault that he didn’t handle the case the way Jason is used to.

I have known Jason for nearly two decades; since law school.  Jason is a very decent, honest, and ethical person.  I believe he takes the job of lawyering very seriously and he practices in a very careful and methodical way.  I have consulted with Jason on cases, we have shared clients, and I know that Jason really cares about getting the best result possible for his clients.  I highly recommend him.

Personally went through a very difficult divorce and child custody/support case, which Mr. Ewing and his professional staff were absolutely phenomenal.  From start to finish, they took the time to quickly answer my questions and also accommodate same day office appointments.  In a time where things were out of control, he kept things in perspective for me and really I wouldn't think of going anywhere else.  My case was settled with everything we had set out to accomplish.  His fast response to emails and calls really helped keep me cool.  I have used several law firms in my life and Mr. Ewing is a rock star..   Sincerely, thank you!!

It has been a pleasure working with Ewing Law Group. I serve in the military and am not stationed in California. Jason has always made everything very convenient and is easily accessible when I need to reach him. He has given me honest, straight forward answers and it is evident that they do what they do to help their clients. They are personable and not what you get from big law firms who are just looking for the next payment. Highly Recommended.

It has been a pleasure to work with both Janet and Jason on different legal matters.  I appreciate their professionalism and willingness to throughly answer any question whether it is minor or could have a major impact on what we are trying to accomplish. Anytime I contact either Janet or Jason, they will respond in a timely manner.  I sincerely appreciate how approachable both of them are. This will be the 3rd straight year I have utilized the legal services of the Ewing Law Group.

I live outside of the state and contacted Ewing Law Group when I was faced with a stressful, frustrating case and a very short time frame that would require them to travel to another county.  I spoke with Jason Ewing, and during our very first conversation it became clear that he is an honest person of integrity.  I explained my situation, and he took the time to answer all of my initial questions, then advised me that he could take my case but that it would be cheaper for me to choose someone closer to the county where my case was filed.  Knowing my financial situation, he also offered to help me complete paperwork myself, but in the end, I asked him to take the case to avoid the stress, and I am so glad I did.  Through the course of working with Jason, he was very professional, but I felt more like I was communicating with a friend than simply an attorney.  I never felt rushed, or that he was “squeezing me in”, even though I had a deadline coming up when I contacted him.
He was very knowledgeable, and was always willing to answer any and all of my questions, no matter how annoying I’m sure they were.  I tend to worry but he never discouraged my “what if” questions and was patient and understanding of all my concerns.  He took the time to break things down into simple terms and make sure that I understood things clearly.
I was impressed with his consistent promptness in returning calls and emails – there are attorneys who figure once they have your money, you are basically stuck, so you can wait until they get around to dealing with your situation.  He informed me that he believes if he is being paid to perform a service, he owes it to his clients to address their concerns as soon as possible, which is something I really respect.  He was very thorough, and I appreciated that if I sent him an email, he made a point to address each issue individually – I never had to email him again or call him back because something was overlooked.
Jason went above and beyond in my case, and we got the outcome we wanted.  I would not hesitate to recommend Ewing Law Group to my friends and family, and would call him immediately if I ever needed legal assistance in the state of California in the future.

He made a lot of excuses and did not communicate expectations. I felt very disrespected by this man. I could go on, but long story short he was extremely rude to me and I would not recommend Mr. Novey.
reviews.ownerResponse: I’m sorry you felt this way. It’s difficult sometimes when a 3rd party is involved and we have to wait over a month for the representation contract to be signed. Good luck!

We know that needing a lawyer can be stressful and oftentimes, daunting, but we are so happy that we were able to assist you with the matter as efficiently as possible. Should you need legal counsel in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to help you with all of your Elder Law needs!

reviews.text:
Our family hired Newman Law Firm after interviewing many attorneys and to say we were extremely pleased with Dan Newman's and his staff's work in handling our case is an understatement. His office staff was extremely professional and at all times helpful and sensitive to our needs.

As an attorney, we found Dan Newman to be second to none. He not only won our case, but throughout the process he worked tirelessly on our families' behalf. What separated Dan from other attorneys I've met is his extraordinary forthrightness, candor, and unwavering integrity. He's simply the best and thus Dan and his firm have my highest recommendation.

Aptos, Calif.

reviews.text:
We had the pleasure of having Dan Newman represent our loved one, who suffered neglect while residing at a well known Memory Care Facility.  Dan has gained a reputation of being "fierce" amongst the Attorneys who represent these facilities. Dan has an innate ability to show compassion and empathy towards his client's situation.  Because of Dan's fierce reputation, opposing counsel brought 6 Attorneys with them to our mediation!  I am very satisfied with the service our family received.  I highly recommend Dan Newman with Newman Law Group.

Elizabeth Leben
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello, Elizabeth. We are honored that you took the time to leave us such a positive review. We strive to represent our clients to the best of our ability and never stop fighting until the case is won. Please never hesitate to reach out if you need anything else. Have a wonderful holiday season.

reviews.text: Our company’s experience with the Newman Law Group has been exceptional.   We have primarily worked with Sherril Wurm at the law firm. reviews.text: Barbara Newman is by far the best family law attorney I have ever been introduced to. She is more than seasoned, her attention to detail is amazing and her work ethic is on point! I trust this firm knowing that they will fight for what is fair. I would refer anyone and everyone I know to this law firm. Even years before I met Barbara in person I heard from friends who she had represented and they would say…”you don’t want to end up on the other side if Barbara isn’t representing you- you definitely want her on your side!!” Overall it’s great to know I have someone that I know will always be in my corner when I need legal help. Thank you again to Barbara Newman and to her awesome team!⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.text:
I so appreciate all the hard work and thoughtful advice and direction that my husband and I have gotten working with Heather at the Chubb Law Firm. I am very grateful to be working with a group I can trust and feel confident in the direction I am given. Truly a godsend.
Thanks so much Heather.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and thoughtful review! We're truly honored to have had the opportunity to work with you and your husband. It means a great deal to us that you felt supported and confident throughout the process. Our team is deeply committed to helping families navigate the complexities of estate planning with care, clarity, and compassion. Knowing that our guidance has made a meaningful difference for you is incredibly rewarding. We're grateful for your trust and look forward to continuing to support you in the future!

reviews.text: Excellent service by the entire Chubb Team. Everyone there was knowledgeable and helpful.

I used Heather Chubb to update my trust and had a wonderful pain free experience! Every step of the process was clearly communicated and the supporting staff (Erica Fox) was terrific. Highly recommend choosing Chubb Law Firm!

I highly recommendThe Chubb Law firm in Folsom, CA. Setting up a trust can seem intimidating- but Heather & her team really know how to break it down into understandable & manageable steps. Professional, friendly, approachable & they get the job done!
Heather and her staff are amazing!!!

reviews.ownerResponse: We're sorry to hear about your experience.  We're usually known for our great customer service and we regret that we didn't live up to those expectations here.

reviews.text: Everyone at Chubb law firm was thorough, concise, and caring.  We had a great experience and highly recommend the firm.
We just finished much long over do family planning. Heather is very patient and explains everything so well. She really makes you think and be realistic. Highly recommend her !

I was absolutely without a clue as to how to begin or what I should do to establish an estate plan. I did know that I wanted someone I could trust that was honest and I would have confidence in.  I was referred to Heather by my friend who was being  legally advised by Heather on another estate,  she was very satisfied with her work and thought I might be happy with her service. At our consultation appointment her presentation was very thorough, I had lots of questions, she was easy to talk to and was able to guide me to just the kind of estate plan I needed, that was 10 years ago, do to circumstances in my life I have had to make changes to my plan and I always go back to her for her legal services and guidance. I have recommended Heather B4

My wife, Sue and I really appreciate the concern and care Heather took in doing our estate planning. It has given us peace of mind. Heather keeps us informed of the latest changes in the laws that we might want to consider. We highly recommend her and the Chubb Law Firm. Ray Olmstead

Jeff just won our family a judgment of over $10 million.

Our case involved a large land and real estate development deal in which our family was ripped off by an unscrupulous development group. Jeff faced defendants with nearly a billion dollars in assets. Needless to say, he was up against one of the best teams of lawyers that money can buy—and he beat them single-handedly.

Juries love Jeff. Judges love him. He worked exceedingly hard for our family. He’s a great person and, without question, the best lawyer in this region.

I can’t thank you enough, Jeff. You saved my family.

A true warrior.

I would like to thank Jeff for helping me in my most stressful time. He was on my case right away and was able to get everything dismissed with no issues. I will be referring Ochrach Law Group to everyone! Thank you Jeff and Denise!

I have been in business for over forty five years, and have not needed many attorneys. But when I recently needed one, I was referred to Jeffrey Ochrach. He handled my case with great expertise.
TMD

I called and they were very rude. The front desk said they don't think they would handle my type of contract dispute and I have to go through Probate (not true). But she generously offered to let me pay $425 to have an attorney tell me the same thing.

My sad story began about thirteen years ago. I was involved in a car accident that, on the surface seemed a simple matter of getting a lawyer and proceeding from there. My lawyer, who had been representing our business for years, mishandled the suit and let my case go past the time I had to settle the matter. He said he simply forgot. My car was in the shop for 1 1/2 years, ended up being totaled and I was left hanging.
It was difficult to find a lawyer that would handle my case of suing another lawyer and his insurance company. I don't remember exactly when I ended up seeing Jeff Ochrach, I do remember making many phone calls and when he said he would be happy to see me, my husband and I made the appointment. And that is how it started. It ended up being a trial by jury. We were in court a week. I had never been in court before and it was overwhelming to me and very stressful. Jeff was wonderful in helping me through that difficult time. Very patient, explained my endless questions, and his confidence in handling the case eased almost all of my anxiety. It seemed he always had time for me and I never felt rushed and I always knew what was going on. Not only did he get the settlement we were asking for (actually more), he also had them cover all my attorney and court costs! He is amazing in the courtroom. I learned things from him that I still use today in handling myself in difficult situations.
We are still good friends, our families get together for dinners at least once a month and on occasion we can get a golf game in. I highly recommend my friend to anyone who needs a friend when it come to the law.

My husband was being sued for breach of contract. He supposedly electronically signed a personal guarantee for a company he was no longer affiliated with. After two years of dealing with phone calls, threatening letters and emails and being served summons twice at our home, we decided it necessary to seek legal advice. We only met with Jeff one time and I knew we had the right person working for us. He got to work immediately and one week later, we received a phone call from Jeff. His call was to inform us that the case was being dismissed and the electronic signature was, in fact, a forgery. Jeff impressed us so much. He made me feel comfortable. He's genuine, eloquent and compassionate. I cannot say enough great things about Jeff.

I needed help on how to interpret and address subpoenas served on myself for personal/business financials, as well as my current and previous employers being served subpoenas for my business financials and lastly, a subpoena to depose me.

Jeffrey Ochrach is a highly skilled legal expert, with a reputation for getting the job done. I was referred to Jeffrey by another prominent regional attorney, indicating the complexity of my case and limited time frame to act and prevail, I would be well served to seek the assistance of Jeffrey Ochrach. Jeffrey is the real deal.

After reviewing his website, reading his reviews, reading his Core Values, I made the call. That call, was the only call I needed to make. In our face to face meeting, Jeffrey understood my needs. He was able to identify the action needed, inform me of what he would do and what I could expect. Jeffrey delivers.

His proficiency, effectiveness, watching him in action in a courtroom setting, it was if it were scripted. Jeffrey is simply amazing.

Could not have felt more protected and watching how his work commands respect and attention, is astonishing. We prevailed, and in the timeframe he had identified in our first meeting.

Jeffrey has become not only my attorney, but my friend. If you have a need for a great attorney, Jeffrey Ochrach is the legal professional your will be happy you made the call.

I have known Jeff since we were both associates at a law firm in San Francisco. We have stayed in close touch and I have enjoyed watching him develop into perhaps the finest trial lawyer I know. He has a remarkable ability to dive into a complicated case, hone in on the issues that matter, and get results. I heartily endorse Jeff.

I am a small business owner and operator of a niche construction business in Rocklin. I needed an experience litigator and trial lawyer. With little time before my trial date, Jeff stepped in and quickly learned the facts, developed a positive and aggressive game plan, and always had me feeling confident that I was now with the right attorney. Jeff is an excellent communicator always making sure I was informed of the “next step”. His daily phone calls and emails to me showed progress and confidence. His communication with other attorneys always portrayed confidence and control. If you are a busy professional or business owner, you already have a full-time job to do. I would strongly recommend Jeff to be your representative and voice with the matter at hand.

We are extremely grateful to have found and hired Mr. Ochrach to represent us. He's intelligent, caring and honest. The lawsuit filed against us was designed to ruin us and lasted for 2 1/2 years. Throughout the entire process he encouraged us to be the white hat and not fall prey to what the other party was trying to do. We followed his very wise advice and we can finally close this chapter and move on. We can't recommend him enough, he is just that good!

When only the best will do...

We found Jeff Ochrach on the AVVO website, after laboring through several months with another attorney and dispiriting results. We decided to call Jeff after reading his uniformly glowing reviews. As it happens, those reviews were spot on, and he is every bit as good as his reviews led us to expect. Jeff was simply superb from start to finish. He represented us in a complex and emotionally draining elder financial abuse suit, ultimately an outgrowth of severe family dysfunction. Jeff was always direct, but at the same time compassionate and reassuring, with a gentle humor that put us at ease instantly. Our entire case was conducted via phone calls and emails from our home on the east coast, and his flawless preparation and execution saved us from multiple (and expensive) cross-country court appearances. As our case wound its way through the legal system, Jeff was on top of every development, knew exactly the right questions to ask, and kept us fully apprised of progress. At the same time he provided opposing counsel just enough information to assure him he was in for a bruising legal battle, without tipping our hand. At each juncture of the case, opposing counsel offered to settle, and the settlement amounts lowered progressively until they finally dropped the case entirely. That saved us the time and costs of travel as well as the entire expense of litigating in court. But equally important, it saved us the stress and emotional drain of a bitter court battle. A case that could potentially have cost us close to a million dollars was finally settled for no damages. And finally, no amount of praise for the Ochrach Law Group would be complete without mentioning his office manager Denise. She was unfailingly efficient, responsive and professional. But at the same time, she was kind and understanding with clients who were emotionally stressed and very unsure of our legal footing. She fielded numerous questions during times Jeff was in court or otherwise unavailable, and knew precisely which questions needed to be passed on. The rest she would answer for us on the spot, further saving us time and money. She was the icing on the cake of a very satisfying outcome. We hope to never again need this kind of legal expertise, but there is absolutely no doubt who we would call – the Ochrach Law Group!

I'm a lawyer in Roseville practicing for over 25 years and have had Jeff represent me in both transactional and litigation business matters over the years.  I have high expectations and Jeff has always exceeded them.  He is very compassionate with his clients but a handful for the other side to deal with.  I unequivocally recommend Jeff for representation in business and real estate matters.

Avvo's slogan "The right attorney makes the difference" defines my recent legal experiences.

I was the Plaintiff in a lawsuit against prior partners for two years ending last week (Mar 2013). I engaged with two other attorneys before I found Jeffrey Ochrach of Ochrach Law Group and filed suit in 2011. My case was ineffective until Jeff. Jeff single-handedly changed my outcome. The contrast between these two prior attorneys and Jeff is stunning.

Jeff is incredibly smart, disciplined, and an artisan in his craft. He is highly accurate, yet honest and forthcoming when he's not sure. High accuracy when committing resources is a huge win.

Jeff's writing is amazing. He is able to conceptualize and simplify complex arguments, laying them out in accessible breadcrumbs. We won all 7 pre-trial motions.

I settled my case before trial in Mar 2013. I am certain Jeff's involvement was a significant factor. The right attorney matters a lot.

Jeff was accessible, engaged, and mentally invested in the outcome of my case. I recommend Jeffrey Ochrach & Ochrach Law Group without hesitation.

Mr. Ochcrach was an amazing help to me during a difficult time in my life. From our first discussion it was clear to me that my case would be handled well. Mr. Ochrach was able to bring complex and at times emotionally charged dynamics into realistic and understandable terms. All of the next steps were explained and well prepared throughout the process. I always had the sense that my best interests were Mr. Ochrach's priority. The level of communication as well as the kindness and professionalism of the office staff was beyond good. Honesty, integrity, compassion and skill are descriptors that accurately describe my experience of Mr. Ochrach.

I do not have a lot of experience with the legal system and never imagined I would ever need this type of help. I do know that I am thankful that Mr. Ochrach was there when I was in need.

Jeff and his assistant Denise provided me with outstanding assistance and support for a family law matter that required sensitivity and expediency. They handled my case with an unsurpassed level of integrity, professionalism, timing and efficiency. I am very proud and grateful to acknowledge Ochrach Law Group. They have and continue to set a standard when it comes to serving our community. Highly recommended. Thank you Denise and Jeff.
Excellent business lawyer.
Was served paperwork. The person ripped a sign off of my front door to post a notice. Very unprofessional. Saw this from my Ring Doorbell Camera.  Rude Service.

Your representation was truly excellent. It’s not only comforting in that it took a lot of the pressure and load off my shoulders, but also your professionalism both in and out of the courtroom was very impressive and competent to the highest degree. Great job!

Having to file bankruptcy was so nervous and could have been a break down. But after meeting with Attorney Hogan, I was immediately put at ease. They were very professional and would make you feel comfortable. Thank you for the effort and a great work.

It has been over a year and I’m sorry it took me so long to finally take time out of my busy life to write this well deserved 5 Star review. Mr. Bones is not only a Estate Planning Attorney but also a compassionate Conservatorship/Family Law Attorney.
Mr. Bones is an attorney who will go beyond the call of duty for his clients. Ours was not an easy case with my adult disabled sister, but with Mr. Bones very busy schedule, he always made me and my sister feel we were his #1 priority. Needless to say Mr. Gordon won our case with his dedication and perseverance. Given his experience as an attorney over 30 years, Mr. Gordons knowledge, compassion and dedication to our case was was superb! Mr. Gordon was also generous with his time when I had questions about estate planning being a homeowner. I would definitely recommend Mr. Gordon Bones for anyone wanting a compassionate, intelligent lawyer.

I am truly thankful for Greg and Terry. This was my first time going through this process and I didn’t know  what I had to do. I am blessed with a fresh start. I would definitely recommend using Gregory Smith. Thank you guys!
Gregory helped make the best of a bad situation ,he walked me through the whole process explaining everything and kept his time line perfect .5 stars all the way

This process would have been a complete nightmare if it wasn't for Terry and Greg.  Stop worrying about an judgement; that will not happen here. What will happen is your life will be less stressful and more enjoyable. What are you waiting for?

Wonderful people. I would definitely refer them.

I am totally grateful for attorney Greg Smith and his staff.  I went to another bankruptcy attorney who wanted $1800.00 to file BK.  If I had $1800.00, I would not be filing for BK.
Greg put me on payment plans and got the creditors to stop calling me. He was patient as well as knowledgeable.  If you want an affordable bankruptcy attorney, go to Greg Smith. Thank you for getting my life back on track.
Don
As a fellow Sacramento attorney, I endorse Brigit Barnes. She has terrific experience in her field and her clients respect her energy, intelligence and commitment to them.

A big day for us for sure. I again want to thank you for all your hard work over the last ten years, especially this last one. As it turns out, your decision to file a lawsuit against all parties, I think, was the kicker that finally forced settlement. It was a great decision!

I am looking forward to our outcome and will be following up with another review once my situation is settled.

If you looking for an excellent law firm that is competent, I highly recommend Richardson Employment law firm expertise and professionalism.

I cannot recommend Richardson Employment enough. From the very beginning, Dan was thorough, compassionate, and incredibly knowledgeable. He took the time to fully understand my situation, explained everything clearly, and made sure I felt supported every step of the way. His professionalism and dedication gave me peace of mind during a very stressful time, and the outcome exceeded my expectations. If you’re looking for someone who truly has your back, this is the lawyer for you. Thank you for everything, Dan!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Natalie! It was a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: I’ve known Dan Richardson for over 15 years—we went to law school together at Gonzaga, served in the Army, and now both practice law in Sacramento. Dan is an outstanding employment law attorney who fights for employees facing discrimination, retaliation, and other workplace injustices. reviews.text: I was one of 5 people in a DUI accident and worried about the bills and how to hire a lawyer to fight for my rights."   The District Attorney office gave me a subpoena to go to court after the drunk guy hit us with his truck. I was unconscious.  They took me to a specialized hospital and I had to have emergency surgery.  Mr. Singh knew how to get the insurance company for the drunk driver to pay out their policy limits quickly.  He is working on getting me more from my own insurance which has higher limits.  We can trust that he will stay on the case and reduce the bills and reimbursements as much as possible because he keeps us informed about what he is working on.  The accident was so bad that some people with me cannot drive, so Mr. Singh came to see each of us, talk to our families, explain the process and cares about his clients.  I will give his name to anyone who needs to see a lawyer because Mr. Singh is someone who will always think of what is best for you when he takes your case.  The money will come first we needed treatment and he helped me get back to my life after such a bad accident when I was only 19 years old.  He has been a lawyer since 1996 which was 24 years ago, longer than I have been alive!

reviews.text: Beware this law firm was representing me for a SSA SSDI claim however after 9 months and talking with 3 different people as well as the last person calling me and asking me to call social security office and find out the status of my claim and letting her know. I found out that my claim had been closed out January 29th due to this group not filing 4 different forms with them that caused social security after 6 months to have to close it out. Now I am starting the whole process over again. I signed and sent in a wet signature via certified mail so the law group could file in my chart and send over to social security which was one thing that never made it over. Not once have I ever been contacted by this group with any updates but saying that it's still going good or it's still moving forward or the last time was you need to call and put us on there to receive updates. I hope other people have a better experience but they have caused nothing but anxiety and grief over them handling this for me.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Collins:
I am very sorry that you feel that Rainsbury Law Group did not handle your claim properly.  We pride ourselves on exceptional customer service and clear, timely communication.  After reviewing your file, it seems Social Security could not reach you by mail or phone to confirm we represented you. Because of this, we could not proceed with your case.
 
We understand that the Social Security system can be very frustrating to those who seek benefits.  The process is time-consuming, technical, and emotional.  If you needed clarification regarding any of your concerns, I am still available to speak with you. Dan Rainsbury, Esq.

We recommend Della Torre Law Firm for the Green Card process. Our case was processed and approved in just two months from the date of application to the final Green Card approval. If you include the time we took to gather documents and complete medical exams, the total process took around three months.

That said, we would have appreciated a bit more personalized attention in certain areas. The process is efficient but relatively hands-off — meetings are virtual, and unless you insist, you may not have direct calls with the attorney before your interview.

In summary, we do recommend Della Torre Law, as the process worked well for us and everything moved very quickly. However, if you’re looking for a highly detailed, step-by-step guided experience or constant communication, this may not be the best fit for your needs — unless you’re comfortable being proactive and asking for what you need throughout the process.

I was originally referred to Castle Law and Tim Del Castillo from a colleague who knew that I needed top notch legal representation. I had a labor dispute with a prestigious celebrity and his legal council was some of the best in California so I needed similar representation.

I met with Tim and discussed my case with him. He was very professional and definitely knew case law and how to properly proceed with my case. I trusted that he would lead me down the legal path that would yield the results I deserved.  The trial process can’t be changed and although the court system took their time in getting to my case, Tim stayed positive and was always reassuring when I was doubting the legal system and their timeliness (or I guess you could say, untimeliness).

When my opposition stepped up his legal game, so did Tim. He consulted with a fellow attorney and formed a legal team to tackle my case.  I never wavered in my trust of Tim’s decisions and in the end, we had a very favorable result with my case.

Through this process, I gained a friend in Tim and if I ever need similar legal counsel, I won’t hesitate to call him.  If you are in a similar situation, I would obviously recommend you do the same.

This was really challenging for me. David and marble law need a serious re evaluation of how they handle business. I hired David for a family case. I only spoke with him once before my trial and received very little information. His paralegal did reach out to me and collect information. We didn't have our pre-trial chat the morning of the trial I was honestly worried if he was even going to show up. During the trial he did advocate for me and I appreciate that, he also insisted that he write the new stipulation and submit it to the court in lieu of having to go to our second court date. Since then I've had zero communication it has been over a month. I have emailed called texted both him his paralegal and marble. I have gotten zero response. I understand that lawyers have many clients they're working with but even a timeline or a confirmation that things are being completed is all I asked. I'm at the mercy of the opposing party having to draft the stipulation and have since lost some of the traction that I gained during our trial. I feel like this was a complete waste of money and would advise against anyone using this service.

Communication is key in family law, and I'm sorry to say, Mr. Castro and his paralegal were just not on top of it. He and his team did not make good on their promise to call back within 1 business day, costing me months and months of wasted time, energy, stress, tears, and money.

I cannot begin to express my regrets working with this law firm. Whereas, I firmly believe Mr. Castro is knowledgeable about family law and strategy, and he may even have had good intentions, he most certainly falls short in what can make or break a client's confidence-- communication and consistency, or should I say "common courtesy?" Maybe he's short staff or has too many cases to handle for one guy?? I don't know, but it was awful. There were plenty times that he just "ghosted" me; which was unreasonable and screwed up a lot of things with the case.

Several times throughout the 6 months I spent working with him, I had to make multiple follow up phone calls, leave several voice and text messages, and send plenty of emails to get a single response out of him (mostly he just ignored me). By the time I wisened up to look elsewhere for legal counsel, it took him an entire month to sign the substitute of attorney needed for my new attorney to come on board, which further delayed the case. He was snarky about it, too, which was just rude.

Between the ex and I, we are in the hole $30k for this divorce; most of which could have been prevented had Mr. Castro communicated properly the desire of the other party and his attorney to settle out of court, to stipulate agreements, and pretty much agree to what I was asking for.

I didn't find out until months later that my ex's attorney reached out to Mr. Castro multiple times agreeing and asking for a phone call to mediate. I was forwarded several emails from my ex showing how many times his attorney reached out to Mr. Castro. He ignored the other attorney and me with no explanation.

Mr. Castro did not pass this information over to me, causing me to pursue orders that were unnecessary and costly for the case. By the time I spent thousands retaining another attorney to take over, he had the nerve to finally call me back. (Two weeks later, by the way).

I have no words. Just disappointed and irritated with how unprofessional Mr. Castro handled everything. Maybe he tried his best (the 2 court filings he managed to turn in, despite being delayed, were done well, hence 2 stars and not 1) but man... this was an utter disaster.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I appreciate your recognition of my knowledge, strategic approach, and the quality of the filings my office prepared. As you know, I truly care about my clients and their outcomes; however, it is equally important to me that they feel supported and satisfied with every aspect of their experience. I regret that I fell short of your expectations in communication during what I know was a very difficult and emotional time.

I respectfully disagree with certain characterizations in your review, but confidentiality rules prevent me from discussing case details in a public forum. I appreciate your candor and the opportunity your comments provide for reflection, and I will contact you privately to acknowledge your concerns and ensure they have been respectfully heard.

Family law matters are deeply personal, and emotions understandably run high. I wish you and your family the best moving forward.

Respectfully,
David E. Castro, Esq.
Castro Legal Group, APC

After a horrible crash, I was so grateful to be still alive. Being close to death can change your whole perspective on life. I could see the good everywhere.

Thank goodness for Ryan Dostart! He knows how to get those responsible to cough up and pay their fair share. I got more compensation than I would have gotten without him; that’s for sure.

I would, and have, recommend him for anyone needing representation.

Ryan Dostart is extremely professional and knowledgeable in his field. He’s a dedicated attorney and committed to his clients outcome. He explained every step clearly during the process.  We were confident that our case was in the best possible hands.  We highly recommend Dostart Law Group.

Ryan Dostart was an absolute lifesaver during one of the most stressful times I’ve experienced. After my accident, the insurance company clearly tried to take advantage of me. I did my best to handle it alone, but it became obvious I needed help.

From the moment I spoke with Ryan, I felt supported and confident I was in good hands. He fought for me and settled my claim fairly and fast. I truly could not have done this without him. If you’re dealing with insurance issues after an injury, do yourself a favor and call Ryan.

In November 2024, I was involved in a three car collision where injuries and damages were sustained. Dealing with the insurance companies was proving to be difficult, and borderline negligent. After realizing I was getting nowhere with the insurance companies, I called Ryan at Dostart Law Group for guidance, and I am glad we did.

Ryan explained the situation we were in, I turned over the information I had, and Ryan took care of the rest. He was able to quickly resolve our claim and have us properly reimbursed for vehicle damages and injuries sustained in no time.
Ryan is professional, respectful and a man with a high degree of integrity. Even though he dealt with much higher profile cases, the care he gave my wife and I made me feel heard and important to him.

I am forever grateful for what Ryan has done for my family and if I ever find myself in a similar situation, there will be no hesitation in calling Ryan.

Ryan is a true professional! He treated US with dignity, and respect. Any questions we had,  he was very willing to address and explain, in a language we could understand. Brooks was extremely well prepared for trial and clearly respected by the court. His ability to stay focused, composed, and persuasive under pressure gave me confidence that my case was being handled by someone who truly knew what they were doing.
Brooks was calm, responsive, and direct when I needed clarity, and he gave me confidence at a time when the stakes could not have been higher. I truly believe his advocacy made the difference in protecting my rights as a father.
If you are facing a DVRO or high-conflict family law matter and need an attorney who is ethical, competent, and genuinely invested in doing the right thing, I cannot recommend Brooks and Crowell Law Offices highly enough.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your thoughtful review, Sara. It truly means a lot to our entire team. It was our pleasure to help you focus on your health and recovery while we focused on the details of your case.

reviews.text:
I feel so fortunate that a trusted source referred me to Maurer Law after a car accident  totaled my car - I honestly had no idea how much it would affect my life, and for how long it would do so. Everyone at Maurer walked me through every step of the process and helped me prepare for all of it. I had some hesitancy retaining a lawyer - I had never done so and didn’t consider myself ‘that’ kind of person. However, the team at Maurer law really have integrity and beyond personal injury cases, pursue elder abuse cases as well.

Not every place I received treatment knew Maurer, but the ones that did all had very good things to say about them. I felt in very good hands through every step of my treatment, even when my mother was diagnosed with cancer over the holidays, and my own care was curtailed for awhile. I can’t imagine many lawyers call their clients personally in situations like that, but that’s what happened - and Marshal dealt with my crying during that call (I think at least once) pretty darn graciously.

All of the staff are ridiculously thorough - Olivia, Natalie, Claire, and Ann come to mind, but all of them have my sincerest thanks. As I’ve heard before, excellence is never an accident. I think Ann deserves to have a massage booked for her just for the time she spent decoding the mess of handwritten notes from my doctor’s visits (the one who will NOT be entering the digital era anytime soon). Pretty sure Ann’s grandmother worked on the Enigma project. I’m happy to say that, most importantly, my life has returned to (whatever is considered) normal and Maurer Law worked some incredible magic on my behalf. I cannot say enough good things about them. Hope to catch you all up in the mountains on some epic powder days, and the rounds will always be on me. Thank you, thank you, thank you 🙏🏽
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow! Thank you for this glowing review, Mary. It was our pleasure to work with you and we look forward to staying in touch!

reviews.text:
I would highly recommend Maurer Law to any of my family or friends. Marshal Parks was the attorney who handled my case, and he was extremely knowledgeable about the process. I also want to thank the staff at Maurer Law for being knowledgeable, hardworking, and kind. Going through a lawsuit can be daunting, but I truly believe that Maurer Law is one of the best at supporting their clients and achieving the best possible results.

reviews.text:
Maurer Law exceeded our expectations!
We chose to seek legal action after my daughter’s car accident. Jordan Maurer was highly recommended to me, both professionally and due to his character.

First and foremost, you need to have confidence in the legal counsel that you choose because this will give you peace of mind, which is crucial for maintaining resilience through a likely long and difficult process. As you push through, this confidence should come from a track record full of success and good recommendations. This is how I was lucky enough to retain him as my attorney. He came under high recommendation from other attorneys in a different part of the state that my family uses. My position is no different than theirs as I have no problem vouching for David Fisher as a criminal defence attorney you can depend on getting you the best results possible. This is an area where giving some sort of public recommendation to people is quite serious to me because it's something that could affect people's lives, and I would never give a recommendation that I wasn't confident in.

I'm quite sure that choosing David for the job ensured that I could move on with my life in the trajectory that I had always hoped for.

reviews.text: We had been wanting to take care of our assets to make things easier for our family when we die. We needed an estate plan and personal wills. I found Elijah Grinevich through a Google search. He contacted me and we set up a time for a Zoom meeting. I found Elijah to be very professional while very easy to talk with. He immediately put us at ease. Making an estate plan and wills can be an emotional task. It took us a year to complete ours- not for any fault with Elijah and his team, but because of my husband and my busy schedules and life's events that made it hard for us to sit down and figure things out. For some decisions we needed to sit and wait for a consensus between my husband and myself. We found Elijah to be very patient and quickly answered any questions we asked him along the way. He gave us some advice for some of our questions. We went through several revisions and couldn't be more satisfied with the final product. I don't think we could have found a better company to work with. The documents came in an beautiful album along with a flash drive with everything on it. I was impressed. The cost of everything was unbelievable. About 25 years ago I had the same kind of work done and it cost 4 times more than we were charged with Elijah Grinevich.
Elijah and his team helped me open up my first LLC. They are very knowledgable and were very helpful. Thank you!
Very professional, excellent communication and follow thru. My finished documents for Estate planning were extremely well done.

Recently I had a case opened and closed by Grinevich Law Group.
From beginning to closing case, I was very happy with their prompt responses and knowledges they have.

I was very impressed and satisfied with their prompt responses and satisfactory result.  Also they are quick to work on your case, so they don't waste your time.
Especially as English is my second language, they understood what I tried to explain and express.  It's like they read my mind.  I didn't need to/or look for hiring attorney who speaks my language.   They are very kind and nice, so you will feel very comfortable to explain your situation.
Even in the future, I will seek their help if I may encounter an issue (I hope it won't happen, but no one knows the future).
Also I will definitely refer my friends and family to Grinevich Law Group.

They truly work very hard - they seem to have 30 hours a day.

Thank you very much again Grinevich and staff.
If you need help from a great attorney call Mr. Grinevich, the modern day Perry Mason for the little guy. Julia will gladly take your call and get you started with the help you need.

I had a very professional experience with Elijah. He was very helpful when I first reached out, excellent communication and made me feel comfortable. I will definitely consider this firm for future legal matters.
Professional and up to the point. Elijah went extra mile to understand my situation and provided a detailed plan of actions for my business. Thank you Elijah and Grinevich Law team!

Elijah was amazing. He helped me in seeing what legal options I had. He and his team were very helpful and always available if I had questions. I would highly recommend.

Elijah is very detail oriented, meets deadlines, learns all details about the business so he doesn’t miss a step! I highly recommend him, working with Elijah I can trust that my business and legal needs are in great hands. He’s amazing!

If you're looking for an attorney who cuts through the fluff and gets the job done with laser focus, look no further than Mat! From the moment I first spoke with him, I knew I was in good hands. His direct communication style was a breath of fresh air, and he never tried to sugarcoat the situation or give me false hope. Instead, he laid out the facts clearly and explained my options in a way I could understand.

Mat truly went above and beyond in handling my case. While I focused on my recovery, he took care of all the legal heavy lifting, ensuring everything was filed on time and every detail was addressed. Not only did he tackle the legal aspects, but he also surprised me by proactively tackling the complexities of my medical insurance, saving me a tremendous amount of stress and headache.

His dedication didn't stop there. He kept me regularly updated on the progress of my case, always available to answer my questions, and genuinely invested in achieving the best possible outcome for me. In the end, his hard work and expertise paid off, and I couldn't be happier with the results.

If you're in need of an attorney who's honest, competent, and truly fights for his clients, I wholeheartedly recommend Mat. He's a legal champion you can trust!

Also, special shout out to his amazing team as well! They were always friendly, responsive, and a pleasure to work with.

They deserve beyond 5 stars!

With much appreciation,
Steven Davis
On the right-side of Natoma Street, across from Sherrifs office. Nice facility

reviews.text: I hired this company to overlook a trust that I had signed already. Originally they said it would be a $500 consult review fee. The actual “ legal evidence “ they gave didn’t hold up in court and they bailed on being my expert witness when it came time. Thanks for nothing this place is a rip off. Avoid at all costs.

reviews.text: Hands down this is a great law firm!  The attorneys are bright and highly knowledgeable in their chosen specialty. What I also enjoyed about Goff Law is that their office culture is warm and personable, and I felt comfortable from the moment I stepped into their office.  I identified with their approach to how they draft and write trusts. If you need a trust written or revised, this is the team of attorneys you want to do business with.  It's a one and done process where they cover every step of the process.  You will not be left wondering if there anything else that I may have forgotten.  All relevant information will be completed.  Because once you're dead or incapacitated, you cannot make changes. You truly want your trust done right the first time - so when you leave this earth, you will know that everything was managed for you, your heirs, and benefactors.

reviews.text: I was completely blindsided when a financial company came after me with a lawsuit. I had no idea what I was doing and honestly felt like I was drowning in legal jargon and threats. Jamil White through a referral and it was the best call I could've made. No sugar coating, no run-around—just straight talk about what we were dealing with and what needed to happen. Jamil broke everything down so I actually understood what was going on, handled all the back-and-forth with the other side, and got me through it without the nightmare I was expecting. If you're in over your head with something like this, you need someone who's going to shoot straight with you and actually get results.

Jamil & Nicole fought hard snd did not give up! they kept me updated literally every step of the way and answered any questions or calls I had. We ended up 3k short of policy limits which is great considering what insurance offered to start with! this is a great team of people.

Louis White Law is absolutely outstanding. Jamil and his team treated me with genuine compassion and care from the start, making a very difficult situation much easier to get through. They were warm, professional, and always quick to respond, making sure I understood every step of the process. Most importantly, they delivered results, staying on top of everything and getting things done efficiently and effectively. I’m so grateful for their support and highly recommend Louis White Law to anyone who needs a lawyer and team that truly care and will fight for you.

We used Jamil for a civil suit due to a persistent nuisance.  We were at our wits end and had never sued anyone before.  Jamil guided us through every step of the process and was completely transparent on our case.  Some would say he is a little unconventional, but in our opinion, that is his strong suit.  He delivered the results we were after and would definitely use his services again in the future if needed.  If you are in need of an effective and direct attorney, Jamil is the right attorney for you.
We had a victorious outcome. So thankful that I chose this Law firm.

Jamil was truly fantastic! A determined go-getter, he provided incredibly responsive, fast, and professional service. During a challenging family dilemma, I felt stuck—but Jamil had all the answers. His dedication and tireless commitment to getting the job done were remarkable. He made the entire process seamless, ensuring that communication was clear, effective, and efficient. I felt completely at ease knowing he was handling my case. Highly recommend!

Due to the nature of the correspondence, I was very nervous to call. I've been putting off a bank of America credit card debt since 2014 but I'm trying to rent a place and need this taken care of.
I called today (2/6/19) and talked to Alexa. She was able to accept a settlement of about 70% of my original debt that was owed. I have until 2/25 (nineteen days) to pay. I asked what the process would be. She said they can take payment of check by mail, check by phone, or input my bank account info on their website. After the payment is made, they'll send notice to the courts and to BofA that the debt has been settled. BofA will send notice to me and to credit bureaus that the debt is settled.

(When I called BofA to confirm, they said the opposite: that Nelson & Kennard would be the ones to report and that BofA would only receive the info. I told him N&K said it was the other was around. He shuffled some papers, stuttered a bit, and then said I was right. So, to everyone reading this, I think the best idea would be to keep calling N&K, and the credit card company until you receive notice in the mail that it's settled, and you check your credit report to make sure it's shown as settled.)

We all agree that debt collectors are scumbags and should be ashamed of themselves for how they make their money. But it was my responsibility in the first place to pay the money I owe.

The phone call with Alexa was much less painful than I thought it would be.

I had an extremely frustrating and misleading experience with Nelson & Kennard. They failed to provide proper debt validation despite multiple requests, which is a clear violation of the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA). They also incorrectly added fees to my account, misrepresented legal proceedings, and contributed to inaccurate reporting on my credit file.

Despite claiming they don’t handle credit reporting, my credit report initially included an incorrect balance that matched their improper charges—meaning they either reported the debt themselves or provided the wrong information to the creditor. Even after disputing the issue, my credit report still does not reflect the debt as disputed, violating Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) regulations.

They also attempted aggressive and excessive process serving at a secured apartment complex, even after they had my correct address on file. Their communication has been evasive, and they still have not addressed my concerns after I escalated complaints to the Better Business Bureau (BBB), Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), and the Attorney General. I am now having to escalate the matter through private legal channels.

If you're dealing with them, know your rights under FDCPA and FCRA, demand written validation of the debt, and document everything. I would strongly recommend seeking legal representation if they attempt to collect from you. They are acting in willful disregard for the law and their conduct is nothing short of criminal.
Horrible people to work with. The rep i spoke to was rude.

Worst debt collection company ever! The customer service in english and spanish were absolutely terrible. So before you settle with this firm please look deep into your legal options and your rights. We are stuck with them for 2 years because we didn't know this: this law firm does not allow early payoffs on a payment arrangement because according to the customer service rep, this firm depends on that income from our payments. Since the customer service rep was very unprofessional and uneducated in her field of work, she couldn't properly and in depth answer my questions as to "Why?" So I had to look it up myself. According to this company paying them off early will disrupt their business model, potentially impacting their profit margins by reducing the amount of time they collect interest on the debt we are paying them, and sometimes because they have already factored in the expected income from a drawn-out payment plan when negotiating with the debtor. This is why we are doing the Dave Ramsey method and never have to deal with companies like these. To this Firm: I hope you better your service at least on your customer service and accurate message and information delivery. God be with you.

I realized they simply wanted my banking info for exactly that purpose and they didn't care that I was making payments on time for the agreed upon amount. I continued paying them (even more than our agreed upon amount) because I knew if I missed even one payment our settled amount would be breached by me and I would be back on the hook for the full amount. I borrowed from family just to be done with them. Beware!

reviews.ownerResponse:
I must respectfully disagree with your review and analysis of the situation. All written communications to my office were responded to, and phone calls were promptly returned.
According to Family Code Section 2339(a), no judgment of dissolution is final for terminating the marriage until six months have passed from the date of service of a copy of the summons and petition, or the date of the respondent's appearance, whichever occurs first. While six months is the minimum timeframe to receive a divorce, most cases do not resolve within this period. Several issues can arise that may delay the process. Although I cannot discuss specific client cases, I will refrain from detailing the reasons that led to delays in this particular case.
What concerns me most is your broad-brush characterization of former clients as liars, as if your opinion is the only one that matters. This behavior speaks volumes.

I believe my office handles cases efficiently and at reasonable prices. However, when contested cases become complicated, it is entirely appropriate for any attorney to require fair compensation for the services they provide or will provide on behalf of their clients.

OMG! I don’t have words to express my gratitude to Mr Vicente T. Cuison. If I had a choice of rating his stars, I would give him unlimited stars as the best immigration lawyer. He has helped me process the family-based immigration of my brother, who lived overseas. Our case was one of the most complicated. Before approaching him, I had already consulted with two other immigration lawyers. But one was very rude, and the other was not approachable. When I was very disappointed one day, I searched for the immigration lawyer nearest to me, and I found him on Google. Somebody mentioned him, and what touched my heart was his kindness. At the time, I needed someone with a kind heart. When I met him in his office for a consultation, I found him not only kind but a very humble person, too. And when I told him about the background story of our case. He gave us an excellent positive response not only in accepting our case but also assured us that he would help us to win the case. Our family-based immigration petitioner was my father, who passed away before the case got current. After two years of my father’s death, my brother’s immigration case was current. Initially, we belonged to Afghanistan, and the situation in our native country was terrible.
My brother was leaving overseas with his family. The case had so many complications during the process that we went through. Mr. Cuison helped us initially with a highly complex process of humanitarian reinstatement. If he had not been there, it would have been impossible for us to make all of those paperwork arrangements and organize them with valid proofs to make our case more vital for the office of the USCIS in making decisions. With the help of Mr. Cuison, during the hard times of the early COVID-19 pandemic after two years of hardship, my brother’s family-based humanitarian reinstatement was approved by the office of UCSIS. But this is not the end of our journey; in my brother's case, after the approval of humanitarian reinstatement, we waited a few months to receive a welcome letter or an email from the NVC to activate their case. But unfortunately, nothing happened. After a few months of waiting, Mr. Cuison helped me reach out to our area member of the Congressional office twice, once during humanitarian reinstatement and once at the time of the NVC. In both times, he wrote legal documents to clarify the congressional office for supporting our case. If we had not known Mr. Cuison, it would not have been easy for us to make all those documents ready for the congressional office.
Mr.Cuison has not only helped me win this case but also helped me with another complication I had when filing the DS260 form. That was the aging-out of my two brother’s children. He has helped me immensely with the process of the child support act and calculating the ages of my niece and nephew. He requested the NVC with the letter, including the calculation of my niece and nephews with the formula the USCIS has provided. He also mentioned why these children should be together with their parents, with solid evidence. After the requests for reinstatement of CSPA, the NVC office added my niece and nephew to the case and reinstated them. All of these achievements happened because of the support, time, effort, help, and, more than everything, the honesty and sincerity of Mr Cuison toward his work and profession. He is so very kind, humble, and down-to-earth that you can not find like him these days. He is not a greedy person. He is working not to make money but to help people. His charges are affordable.
My entire family will always be grateful to Mr. Cuison and will never forget his support, kindness, time, and dedication to my brother’s case. He will always be in our prayers. We all wish him and his family good health and happiness. And I highly, highly highly recommend him to anyone who needs immigration assistance/help. God bless him.
