I highly recommend hiring Scott Ashton with Ashton and Price.

The county I live in is large, with numerous medical providers. After my car accident, I felt overwhelmed by the prospect of researching and choosing where to receive treatment. I ultimately chose Ashton and Price to assist with my bodily injury claim because their website mentions they “…work with highly qualified medical experts, forensic professionals, and investigators in Northern California.” Before reaching out to them, I was working with my primary care doctor, who minimized my symptoms. It was important to me to have a lawyer who could help connect me with top-tier medical providers, which led me to Scott Ashton.

Scott is knowledgeable, personable, and responsive. For example, I had never considered getting an X-ray or MRI for my symptoms until Scott suggested the benefits of further assessment based on what I described. Following his advice, I discovered injuries that weren’t visible to the naked eye. While Scott is not a medical professional, his recommendations for further evaluation demonstrated his years of experience and expertise in handling bodily injury claims.

Ashton and Price also seem to have a trusted network of medical professionals, which was incredibly helpful. When faced with the daunting task of choosing from hundreds of providers on Google, Scott provided a list of trusted options. Choosing a provider from that list was simple, and I was very satisfied with the treatment I received.

Scott’s personable nature stood out as well. During our first meeting, he offered me water and shared some fun facts about himself. While small gestures, they made him feel approachable and welcoming. Throughout the process, Scott broke down complex legal jargon and processes, ensuring I fully understood each step and had ample opportunities to ask questions.

Unlike other lawyers I’ve worked with, where communication was primarily through receptionists or case managers, the majority of my interactions were directly with Scott. He helped negotiate reductions in my medical bills to maximize my net settlement. Beyond that, he educated me on how to better protect myself and my family in the future by making key adjustments to my auto insurance policy.

Overall, I am extremely satisfied with Scott’s services and wholeheartedly recommend him. If I ever need a bodily injury lawyer again—though I hope I won’t—I would not hesitate to return to Scott Ashton. Thank you, Scott!
The firm has been helping me with an accident case. I highly recommend this firm. They have a great staff, and I feel like they care about me.

reviews.ownerResponse:
I do not know who this person is. She was not a client of mine. I just checked my voicemail messages and email. I keep records all of my voicemail and email messages. I have no record of ever having been contacted by you.

reviews.text: Molly Watson was absolutely fantastic to work with!  I had never required legal services before, but there comes a point where you can't do it on your own and need to call in the reinforcements. The school legal process can be very overwhelming and anxiety producing for parents and thankfully Molly was so calm and very patient throughout our entire case. I very much appreciated her compassion and ability to adapt to challenges as they presented themselves. She absolutely advocated for our 9 year old when we were faced with great opposition surrounding a dispute with our son's IEP.    She was meticulous and kept my husband and I informed every step of the way. You can tell that she takes great pride in her work and her expertise was so greatly appreciated. Even in these odd times that we find ourselves in with regards to Covid-19 she was very responsive and showed immense dedication to our son's case. I am so grateful and happy that I picked up the phone and called her, I feel like we truly made the right decision, because of Molly my son will have a bright academic future at his new school for this upcoming fall.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much for your kind review. You and your husband were wonderful clients. I truly enjoyed working with you and getting help for your kiddo.

reviews.text:
Martha Miller- She was always confused, requesting all school ieps and all other school documents, which I had mounds of.
After I spent much time and effort getting her all those documents, she would say she didn't understand why I needed a due process hearing. Then with all information in front of her, she would ask questions that were easily understood if she read any of the documents I gave her.
Furthermore, I was on a deadline to file due process, after I confronted her on the delays, and ongoing confusion she had, that I needed a face to face appointment, so we could go through my child's complete files. This is when she tells me, that she dont have meetings with clients until she decides if she is going to take their case.
Well, this is the first time she stated she wasn't sure if she was taking his case.
All the time wasted with her, all my kids files for 2 years, because, yes he was only going into 1st grade. But our deadline for due process filing was a mere months away.
Martha Miller is unorganized, fairly confused on simple conversation, and insensitive. I spent so much time copying my child's files, then she insisted on me mailing her the file, this cost me well over 50$
After she let me know she was unwilling to meet up, I canceled her, and asked for all my kids files.
Do you know, she has a office in Roseville?
About 5 minutes from my house? That's where I picked up my kids files.
Oh, yes, she had me copy every dang thing, which cost a lot, then ship to her.
Martha Miller, is horrible. Alls she did was waste my time and cost me money, and lots of frustration.
Dont waste your time on her, you dont have any time to spare, with your special needs kids.

reviews.text: Jared was hired to take on my son's fight for Social Security Disability benefits.  He worked tirelessly on this case for 2 1/2 years, never hesitating even when faced with numerous roadblocks. Throughout the process, Jared remained professional, responsive, and dedicated-always answering our calls and emails promptly. His commitment and perseverance made a challenging journey much easier for my son.

I highly recommend Jared to fight for you and your disability rights. After years of struggling on my own and facing denial after denial, I finally decided to seek professional help. After my consultation with Jared, I hired him—not only for his many years of experience, but also for his thorough, strategic approach to the hearing process and his diligence in preparing my case, even for the federal appeal level if necessary.

He guided me through every step, carefully preparing me for my hearing and walking me through possible questions. In the end, it was the best decision I could have made—he won my case! The judge approved me well ahead of the usual timeframe because Jared presented everything so clearly.

Do yourself a favor and get Jared on your team—you won’t be disappointed!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Katie for the nice words and being such a great client to work with. It’s amazing to me how friendly you always were despite all you’ve been through.

reviews.text: Walker law and has been great for me! Jared helped me with my stressful SSDI appeals case more in 30 minutes than any other SS lawyer I found on google in the Sacramento area did or even cared to try to help— and I contacted almost all of the SS lawyers I found on google (FYI: there are very few SS attorneys who even do SSDI appeals- that surprised me). My case is just beginning so I don’t have a result to share yet, but I have lived and experienced enough to know that I am glad I decided to call Walker law. Jared Walker is knowledgeable and takes the time to listen, CARE, and honestly advise. I highly recommend Jared Walker and Walker law.

Through the whole process, Jared was honest and straightforward. He was always available to answer my questions, even late at night, and he truly cared about me as a person, not just my case. He explained what to expect at every stage, and he was right every step of the way.

Jared had the difficult job of fixing the mess that Smolich & Smolich created, which made things harder for both of us, but he managed to correct their mistakes and get my case back on track. Unlike the big firms that treat clients like numbers, Jared gave me personal attention, compassion, and real integrity.

I have been a disability lawyer for almost two decades. I take cases through the Appeals Council (you see a judge, then the case goes to someone who reviewed judges decisions) then I stop. Those stages of a case are within the SSA itself. SSA is a department of the federal government. Every department that issues a license or benefit can also take it away. (Think of a liquor license.) When the department refuses to give it (disability) or takes it away (liquor license) you have the right to appeal it (SSA-judge; liquor license state commission).  When after it’s over, the department still refuses to give you the license or benefit, you can take it out of the department. Social Security judges only do SSA cases. Federal district court judges do pretty much every thing. It’s a long chain from the federal district court, to the federal appeals court; and finally, the Supreme Court.

Jared comes into the case right where I leave off.  I don’t go to the federal courts. I met Jared through kind of a fluke. I think he sent out a blanket letter to lawyers who work through the Appeals Council that said: Hey! I’m here.  I’d never met him or seen his work until I suggested him to a client; she hired him; and he got the case sent back to the Social Security judge who changed the unfavorable to a favorable decision.

It’s hard to find people who are within driving distance who do federal cases. I know there are people who have a national practice and are very, very good.  In my experience, Jared is every bit as qualified as those who conduct seminars for people like me. I think he’s lost one (could be two) cases at the federal level.  I’ve referred so many clients over the 8 years I’ve known him, it’s hard to remember.

I’ve met him face-to-face one time, so it’s not like we’re pals who hang out playing lawn darts. Mostly, he’ll send me an email that he’s accepted a case; I don’t hear from him again for up to 2 years; and he emails back that the client won. He only does federal work. I only do hearings. So our paths don’t cross. He just won another case this week and wanted to share my experience. This is not an advertisement for me or Jared. He didn’t ask me to write it. I don’t care if you find me for a consultation or not.(I’d rather you don’t. I have enough work of my own.)  I’m just sharing my experience for what it’s worth.

reviews.text: Lauren and her team are awesome. Always available and ready to help me. I wouldn’t have all the memories and time with my son if she wasn’t my attorney. You’re treated like they are on your side and fighting for you. I have and always will refer Lauren and her team to anyone that needs to get child custody. 6 out of 5 stars for sure!

I was referred to Lauren's team after speaking with several attornies that told me my divorce and custody case was "too big" for their offices to take on. I was dealing with a move-away situation, false accusations, renigging on agreements, court orders not being followed, not even being able to get ahold of the other party most times... it was an absolute stressful mess.

From day one Lauren's team swarmed onto my case. They knew everything end to end about the different complexities of my situation. They knew all the family law judges in Sacramento County and exactly what to expect every time we went to court. They were extremely hard working, making sure to always go into court prepared, and their responsiveness to all of my questions and concerns was unbelievable. They also tried to save me money any way they could, and worked with me wherever they could financially trying to cover the cost of the case.

There were so many times with the onslaught of these claims and accusations that I wanted to give up, I just couldn't handle the stress of nearly four years of it. But Lauren convinced me that I had a good case. I was a good father. Being with me is what was best for the kids. And things would only get worse if the situation was left unaddressed. And it ultimately paid off. Not only am I happy with the outcome, and my children were happy to finally be reunited with their older brother, and our new life we were able to build together without the stress of this situation looming over our heads.

Most importantly, I got myself back. I'd gotten to the point where I was questioning whether or not I knew what was best for my own kids, whether or not I deserved what I thought was fair. But after all the times Lauren told me "Don't give up, we can do this." - it finally stuck in my head. Best money I've ever spent. And knowing she's got my back from now until my kids are adults has let me finally relax and just focus on being a dad.

This divorce and custody battle, now several years resolved, still stands as the hardest thing I ever went through. I still look back on the day that Lauren took my case as the day I started to get my life back. And now my kids and I are doing better than I'd ever expected. She is the best lawyer to have in your corner. Period.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for such a kind and thoughtful review. Hopefully you won’t need us again, but we are here if you do!

reviews.text: The team at Patrick Law, P.C. is amazing to say the least. They handled my custody and child support case with extreme care and sincerity, I was well informed and comfortable with their professional and personal guidance. They are detailed oriented and were able to shut down the opposing counsel at just about every angle. Being from out of town it was great to know that I was in good hands and I appreciate all their efforts in delivering the best overall outcome! Thanks again Sean, Lauren and team!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Chad. Always a pleasure to help amazing people.  Thank you for trusting our firm to handle your case.

reviews.text: The attoreys at Patrick Law, P.C. are honest, kind and proactive – they lifted such a huge weight and worry off my shoulders.  I had a very contentious custody case and I felt backed into a corner, trying to defend my daughter and me by getting a restraining order on my own.  I was naïve to the court process and thought I could do it on my own. I was wrong. The team at Patrick Law, P.C. jumped in right away and helped me to see the situation differently to ease my  upset and worry.  They worked with the other side to put out the fire rather than inflame it to run up unnecessary fees.  Ultimately, I got the restraining order and the custody I was desperately needing. Patrick Law P.C.’s integrity shines and I have to say…. How empowering to hear the other attorney squirm when she recognized my attorney’s name!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your honest review of our firm. We were honored you chose our firm to represent you and wish you the best.

reviews.text: Shaun has represented me more than once in car accidents where I needed help getting the other driver's insurance company to accept liability.  Shaun patiently and professionally advised and assisted me through the process, which was a challenge as I was recovering from concussions in each case.  Shaun truly cares about his clients and in every case was able to reach a fair and reasonable settlement.

I was rear-ended in my first and only car accident 8 months ago and Shaun helped me negotiate an uninsured motorist claim with my insurance carrier. He took care of everything and made the process as painless as possible. I will definitely be using his services again in the future.

When Shaun takes on a case from one of our patients, it gives us a safe confidence in knowing they will be well-taken care of. Shaun is not only exceptionally knowledgeable, but extremely compassionate. His client's care is his top priority and he advocates for their health and future. His communication to not only his clients but to us as well surpasses every business in the area. He is a joy to work with and a fantastic lawyer.

I really wish I had pick Shaun to represent my car accident case originally.  I know he would have won.  I went with another attorney and was referred to Shaun by my chiropractor when my other lawyer botched my case.  Working with Shaun was a night and day difference from working with my other attorney.  Shaun was responsive, patient and explained things clearly.  Even without being my attorney, he called the insurance company on my behalf and within two weeks got me the information I had been waiting 5+ years for from my other attorney.  I hope to never need another personal injury attorney, but if I do, I will be going to Shaun!  I also plan to refer any friends or family who need personal injury attorney lawyers to him.  I highly recommend Shaun as a personal injury attorney!

Shaun has guided me through two car accidents. He is extremely knowledgeable, honest about what to expect and he genuinely cares about his clients. He is an amazing attorney and a spectacular human!!! If you've been in an accident, I highly, highly recommend talking with him!! You won't regret it.

Working with Shaun was a pleasure. He was always available when I called and he is the utmost consummate professional. I would recommend his office to anyone seeking a positive and honest experience when dealing with " personal injury " case. I'm so happy that I was referred to his office.

Shaun was referred to me by a friend. I am not experienced with a lot of legal issues so I had no idea who to turn to. I was injured in a car accident and also found a great chiropractor who also gave a great reviews about Shaun stating that there were only 3-4 attorneys in town that he would recommend and that Shaun was one of them. These excellent referrals only confirmed my experience with Shaun. From day one he explained options to me in plain English and also was not afraid to stand up for what he believes in. He even went as far as being willing to take chances at his own expense on my behalf because he was confident that justice would and should be served. I did not have one single experience of greed nor confusing “legal jargon” with Shaun, but instead a heart for justice met with wisdom in determining the best course of action  for my case. I would recommend Shaun hands down to anyone seeking fair resolution to their legal issues. Thank you to Shaun and his team!
Despite a long process and no worries about the size of the claim Shaun did a great job in handling my case. Thanks Shaun.

I have worked with Mr. Edwards and his office on several matters, and I am always pleased with his knowledge, demeanor, professionalism, and top-notch results.  He has helped me through some very complex situations and I could not  be more satisfied.  I highly recommend Mr. Edwards!  You want him as your attorney!
Shaun is amazing and I would highly recommend him. He handled my PI case and was practical, straightforward, hard working and very informative.

I got in a car accident in October and was immediately recommended to Shaun, he helped me throughout every step of the way and made sure to communicate what was happening with every aspect of my case, even though we didn’t win as much as we asked for Shaun made sure that I still ended up with some money in my pocket. i couldn’t have gone through this process without Shaun and i will be recommending him to all my friends with legal needs

Shaun took on my case after it being tossed around for almost two years. It didn't matter how small the claim was Shaun took on the case. He was very thorough in all of his explanations and gave me different potential scenarios. He made me feel like he always had my best interest at hand and never made me feel forced to make a decision. He was truly a pleasure to work with, always very responsive. I would definitely recommend him. Thank you Shaun!

Shaun represented both my daughter and I in a PI due to a rear-end MVA involving three vehicles. We chose Shaun because we are not sue happy And we really liked his calm rational approach.

My 18-year-old daughter was the driver when we were rear/ended and I was the passenger.  We were stopped on the freeway when the MVA occurred and 100% NOT at fault but due to the lack of accurate detailed information in the police report it was difficult to determine which of the other two parties were at fault. Long story short,  Shaun handled the case very well and I received the maximum we could get based on the insureds coverage which appeared most at fault. Shaun offered a partial disbursement payment until he successfully negotiated my medical bills down by 50%.

GOD IS GREAT!  And I recommend Shaun too!

Thank you Shaun!
He's a fantastic lawyer! Really helped us get what we were owed after an elderly man who was underinsured hit us. I can't recommend him enough!

I am so grateful that I was referred to Shaun. When I was in a car accident (which I was not at fault for), I assumed that insurance would take care of everything. Apparently that wasn’t the case. There were hidden expenses involved that I wasn’t aware insurance would refuse to pay, and I was told that I would be held responsible for paying thousands of dollars. It didn’t seem right, and I didn’t know where to begin to navigate this already stressful situation. I was given Shaun’s information and from the moment he took my case, everything went smoothly. He was professional, very knowledgeable and experienced. He gave me unbiased information every step of the way and made sure to get my approval before taking any action on my behalf. Finally, he was able to negotiate with the insurance companies to cover everything. The relief was priceless. I highly recommend Shaun to anyone who is navigating a personal injury.

I want to say a huge “thank you” to Shaun T. Edwards.

Shaun was highly recommended to me after I was injured in an auto accident.  He was courteous, professional, communicated wonderfully and made me feel at ease.  I was impressed with his knowledge and expertise.  He answered all my questions and explained everything I needed to know.  He took care of everything with the other party and secured a settlement that I am very happy with.  His fees were reasonable and he worked diligently on my behalf.

Because of Shaun I was able to focus on healing from my injuries and not worrying about paying the medical bills.

I would happily recommend Shaun to anyone that needs a good, experienced personal injury attorney.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Evan Duke was not a client of HVH. However, we believe there may be some misunderstandings in Ms. Duke’s comments. After her father’s passing, she expressed dissatisfaction with the distribution of his estate, despite receiving assets he specifically left to her. It’s important to clarify that the estate was distributed according to the deceased’s wishes, and we have no control over personal family decisions or their outcomes.
All actions related to Ms. Duke’s father’s will and trust were carried out in compliance with legal requirements and his instructions, as well as ordered by the court, despite Ms. Duke being represented by legal counsel throughout the process.
Regarding concerns about cremation, we understand these decisions are deeply personal and emotional. We respect that families may have differing views, but our role is to ensure the directives are followed as instructed by the deceased and that their wishes are honored. The agent diligently followed the decedent’s wishes outlined in his directive.
Since decedent’s passing in 2016, Ms. Duke has continued to harass our office. In 2018, we sent her a letter regarding fraudulent accusations, warning that if she did not cease and desist, we would be forced to pursue legal action against her. Now, almost 9 years later, she continues to make false and unfounded statements on multiple platforms.

reviews.text: I hired the firm to draft a construction contract and was told it would take approximately 2 weeks to complete and it would be approximately $1000. The scope of work was discussed to be a contract for the customer, and one for sub-contracting. It took 8 weeks to get the first draft of the construction contract to me. I had made several attempts to contact the attorney via email and left phone messages with office staff. Once I finally was able to talk with the attorney, I was promised on more than one occasion I would receive the contract by end of the business day and never did. The communication was poor from the attorney. I had expected to be getting a change order form along with the construction contract, but it wasn't included so I asked to have one made. When it was all said and done it was 3 months till I received the change order contract and had all 3 documents. It ended up costing me $2500 as opposed to the $1000 initially quoted to me. There was no communication to me the price was going to be significantly higher than originally discussed. To say I am disappointed would be an understatement. I was charged $90 for an email sent to the attorney and for him to reply and $300 for the change order form which was supposed to be part of the contract.

Following the loss of our son we discovered that his death was preventable. After having several attorneys decline our wrongful death claim we met with Jack Duran. He was very professional and politely listened to our allegations. Once hearing our story, Jack asked some questions and without hesitation he agreed to take on our very difficult and tragic case. With the clock ticking on the statute of limitations, he prioritized our case and immediately sprang into action. We knew this was going to be a very long and complicated process but wanted our sons voice heard with hopes of preventing this from happening to somebody else. The loss of a child is devastating beyond words. Incorporating that with a lawsuit only intensifies the burden. Jack understood and practiced genuine compassion while at the same time, prepared us for the bumpy legal road that we were traveling. Opposing counsel used tactics to try and defeat or dismiss our allegations; Jack was prepared and fought back with professionalism and tenacity. The manner in which he proceeded was nothing short of brilliant. Jack’s knowledge of the law and the legal system is very impressive. Simply put, Jack Duran gets the job done. Without his unique expertise we would have had a very different and emotionally devastating outcome. After a two-year legal battle, our case concluded with the satisfaction that our sons voice was clearly heard and confidence in knowing corrective measures have taken place to ensure a tragedy like this does not happen again.
Jack’s compassion and sincerity was greatly appreciated. He is a straight shooter, trustworthy and his commitment to his clients is unapparelled. He is honest, fair, hardworking, knowledgeable and delivers results. Jack Duran is a man we will never forget. He was a stranger who helped us tremendously during our greatest time of need. Our heartfelt gratitude goes out to Jack, who played a vital role during our most difficult days. His impact resonates far beyond what words can express.
Jamie & Ray

reviews.text:
I had the privilege of working with Lorraine following a serious car accident in November 2024 involving myself and my parents, and I didn’t hesitate to retain her again for a more recent personal injury matter. From start to finish, she has been nothing short of exceptional.

Lorraine is the rare combination of highly professional, deeply knowledgeable, and genuinely kind. She was incredibly patient throughout the process, took the time to explain things clearly, and always made sure we felt informed and supported during what was a very stressful time. Her communication was outstanding—she was consistently responsive, proactive, and never left us wondering about the status of the case.

What truly sets her apart, though, is her tenacity. She is calm, composed, and compassionate with her clients—but absolutely relentless when it comes to dealing with insurance companies and adjusters. Watching her advocate on our behalf with confidence and precision was both impressive and reassuring. You truly feel like you have someone in your corner who will not back down.

I am extremely grateful for the outcome she achieved and for the level of care and dedication she showed my family and me. While I won’t share specifics publicly, I can confidently say the result exceeded expectations and reflected her hard work and skill.

If you’re looking for a personal injury attorney who is diligent, sharp, trustworthy, highly communicative, and genuinely cares about her clients, I cannot recommend Lorraine highly enough.

reviews.text:
Let’s face it, now days with all the challenges businesses face, having the right people representing you while facing the big brother, is the smartest thing you can do. No matter the size of your business or the challenge, you need to have the right people on your side, when it comes to sales tax audit.
We’re so grateful for the amazing work that Mitchell Stradford (senior sales tax specialist) and Jesse McClellan (sales tax attorney)did for us. While relentlessly working as a team, determined to prove our case, their hard work and dedication gave us peace of mind knowing that we can trust their commitment. We highly recommend them and appreciate their level of integrity.

Yes, They Saved My Marriage...
I had dropped the ball and made a series of errors on our Sales Tax filing, my Wife had told me over and over to get some help but I waited, busy with trying to keep our business moving forward and paying the bills. The stress with my Wife was unbearable.
Then the State came in with an intense Sales Tax Audit, a microscope on our books and business. After weeks of losing sleep I called James and the McClellan Team, one of the best business decision I have ever made.
That night I slept.
Over a period of a few months James worked over every document, walked us through the process and took care of every interaction with the State.
Not a single penny was paid to the state, no penalties, fees or interest. It was as if James lifted a 500 pound weight off my back.
I highly recommend James and the McClellan Team... 5 Stars is not enough!

The entire team is beyond professional and experienced. They helped me through a very intimidating audit process. It was such a relief to have them represent me to the board of equalization at the time.

I am so thankful I found this firm during a major tax audit put upon me by the state of California!! Steve Petruzzo really stepped up and aggressively pursued what was right. I paid all of my taxes, I just trusted the wrong CPA. He proved that by hard work & dedication to showing the auditor I hadn't skipped out on my taxes. If you need a firm that will tirelessly work for you and prove you're not in the wrong, look no further than McCellan Davis, LLC! They are the best sales and use tax specialists!!
Thank you to your entire team for making sure I didn't 'pay' for my accountant's errors.

Although we didn’t retain service, Alex Medina was exceptional and extremely helpful. He provided  great insight and was very knowledgeable about his speciality. I would highly recommend Alex and the firm.

I had several consultations with Estate Planning Attorneys prior to meeting with Tracy Poston Shows. She was recommended by my father who was recommended to Seasons Law by his CPA. Because of these recommendations, I was fairly certain that Seasons Law would be the firm I'd choose to do my estate planning. But I wanted to meet with other attorney's first just to learn, see what kind of questions they'd ask and how much they charged. It was an education, and I suppose it was worth doing, but after meeting Tracy and her staff, I pretty much realized I wasted my time. Tracy covered things with us that I didn't even think of, nor did the other attorney's even ask.  Once Season's Law completed most everything, I was given a short "to do" list. Tracy had offered her time to have conference calls with me and my banking institutions as well as with my insurance company without charging additional fees. She was also very responsive to emails as well as to phone calls. Who does that anymore? Seasons Law does! If you're looking for an Estate Planning Attorney, you need to look no further. Seasons Law has what you need and they look after your best interest. They're much more detailed oriented and the cost was significantly less than some of the others I met. Just as important, Season's Law has the widest selection of candy and the tastiest coffee. If you don't like coffee, they have other types of refreshments. I now feel at peace.  :)

Sam truly came through for me and my case. I was served papers with less than five business days to properly respond and appear for an out-of-state court hearing. The first 72 hours were some of the most stressful and demoralizing days of my life. I couldn’t eat, sleep, and could barely think straight.

I scrambled to find an attorney who was both competent and affordable. As the clock ran down, I prepared myself to travel to California to represent myself—terrified and completely out of my depth.

With only two days left before the court date, Sam reached out and offered to represent me at a price that was within my means. He immediately filed for a continuance, and a few weeks later, my case was dismissed.

I am incredibly fortunate and grateful to have had Sam as my attorney. Thank you, Sam, for the work you do and for the lives you positively impact.
Da'Mon
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words - it's an honor to be your first review. A lot of my work is just getting everyone to take a deep breath, or in some cases a few hundred of them. reviews.text:
Updated Review - As stated in my 1st review, since my son had a second case still open at the time of writing my first review, I would update my review once that case was resolved. This is the update. While my son still had to serve time in jail, I believe that Sam did all he could and most likely my son would have received a longer sentence if it weren't for him being represented by Mr. Burns.  There are just some cases where attorneys can only do so much.

I am writing this review on behalf of my son.  He and his girlfriend hired Samuel Berns to represent him on a felony charge.  From the start Sam was very patient with him and his girlfriend, even though he picked up a misdemeanor charge and another felony charge while his first case was still active.  Sam didn’t sign up for these extra cases, but he agreed to take them on anyway.  From time to time, both my son and his girlfriend didn’t always agree with how Sam was handling his cases.  However, I told them that the issue wasn’t with Sam, but rather that he needs to make better life choices.  I told my son and his girlfriend that it was ok for them to ask questions; however, I advised them that it is in their best interest to listen to Sam and do everything he says, even if they don’t agree. I was able to have several conversations with Sam and after each of those conversations, I told my son and his girlfriend that Sam is very knowledgeable and knows what he’s talking about. He knows how the court system works, which can be very overwhelming to the average person.  My son and his girlfriend admitted that Sam didn’t have to take his additional cases, but that they were grateful he did and also admitted that Sam really had done his due diligence in figuring a way to work the law in his (my son’s) favor.  All along Sam had a plan of action; however, my son and his girlfriend didn’t really see what that was until the end of the case. Sam challenged the prosecutor and investigator and that resulted in the case being completely dismissed in March 2023.  My son and his girlfriend agreed that they should have trusted Sam throughout the whole case even when it seemed like things weren’t going in his favor. My son still has a pending felony and misdemeanor case, and we all confident that Sam will do everything he can to give him the best possible outcomes.  So there will probably be a part 2 of this review.  Thank you very much Sam for all of your time and effort and hopefully when all this is done and gone away with, my son will have learned to make better life choices.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the detailed review. Perseverance is key in this business, and I'm glad I was able to persevere to help your son as he gets through this trying time.

Luckey (lawyer) kept me well informed about the progress they were making on our behalf and was always available to answer any of my questions or concerns. Julie went way beyond my expectations on helping and guiding me and understanding, especially as one of child was a minor in this case. Both Julie and Kent’s professionalism and customer service were outstanding. I would highly recommend Penny and associates to friends and family.

My 16 year old son was injured and his car totaled by a drunk driver in April of 2024. Initially, the drunk driver's insurance company began to call and demand that I allow them to speak with my son, presumably to pressure him to say something that would help their case, even though CHP did a report on site and found the other driver to be 100% at fault. Kent Luckey from Penny & Associates made contact with the insurance company and got the threatening calls to stop immediately. He was ultimately able to get them to accept financial responsibility and get a fair settlement for my son.  I highly recommend Kent Luckey and Penney & Associates.
Talked with Adam who was so helpful in getting me a referral to a lawyer in a different state. I was super stressed and he and Jacob both did great at easing my anxieties. They are AMAZING

I have used Kevin Elder of Penney and Associates for several personal injury cases and have always found him to be professional, highly competent, and responsive. He consistently answered my questions in a timely manner and demonstrated extensive experience in the field of personal injury law. I would confidently recommend him to any of my friends and family seeking representation for personal injury matters.
Responsive. Dependable and fair. They explained everything and helped me along the way during my 1st case for a horrible car accident where my car was destroyed while I was waiting at a light.

The Penny & Associates, Adam M. Hahn, ESQ. & Samuel Messina Legal Assistant provided my family with excellent professional care and comfort during our most traumatic life changing event. They were always respectful and displayed continual remorse for our tragic event. We felt like they were holding our hands as we faced this event. I thank Jesus for using them to give a quick clear and complete understanding of this event. We just want to personally thank them for their loving care, their sensitivity, their comfort and their professional excellent service to our family. To God Be The Glory for using them to help and serve our family.

Adam and Sam did an excellent job of ensuring that I was compensated for my injury. They provided continual communication of the progress of my case, and were always highly professional. My questions were quickly addressed, and I felt a high level of confidence that my case would be resolved in my favor. This team ensured that the insurance companies paid me the full amount I was entitled to
If you have an injury from an accident,  I encourage you to give them a call!

If I could give higher than a 5 star review I would.

Penney & Associates was the absolute best legal firm I’ve ever had the pleasure of doing business with. Their professionalism, along with their compassion, gave me the ability to navigate one of the most difficult periods of my life. Garrett was an absolute treasure to work with. He led me through the legal world with a level of care that I’ve never seen before from a lawyer. His conviction and willingness to fight for our family, helped me regain faith in humanity and faith in the legal system.

Never once did he send my calls to voicemail. He was always there for me for any question, comment, opinion, thought or feeling regarding the case. His grace along with his demeanor was a light during a dark time in my life.

I’ve had the pleasure to work with Seth and Fred on several different occasions. They are straight forward guys that really care about their clients. It really makes a difference when you have an established firm behind you. When the insurance claims people already know who they are when calling, then you’re in good hands!

My son was hit by a car when he was 2 years old and couldn't walk for months he had several broken bones we won are case the deal was my son wa promised a large amount of money when he turned 18 witch was this year penny associate said they no longer have records of it and that they shredded his information and they refused to help toward getting the information causing a delay on money he was getting and they put us through hell my son was was pronounced dead and was revied they have no sympathy for there clients
reviews.ownerResponse: Sonia--We are sorry to hear that you are upset. We are committed to providing high quality legal service to our clients and value your feedback. Please email us or call us so that we can attempt to locate this file and attempt to address your concerns. Our phone number is 800-616-4529 and our email is receptionist@penneylaywer.com. Again, thank you for the feedback.

reviews.text: So grateful for Seth!  While I was recovering from my accident, I had peace knowing he was on top of my medical bills and insurance.  It helped me focus on getting back to work and healing physically and mentally.  Thank You!

I have known Fred Penny for over 40 years as a friend.  I never had the occasion to call upon him for his service until 2021 when we had a serious automobile accident in Redding CA.  This was caused by a woman who I will say without doubt is an unskilled under insured driver.  Fred and son Garrett were able to get us satisfaction from the insurance company.  We were able to pay our extensive medical expenses!  This woman is a threat.  I hope she never runs into us again!

But !  But if she does we have Penny and Associates!!!

A car accident can turn your life upside down in an instant. You absolutely need to enlist the services and help of Penney & Associates!  They are truly top notch in guiding you the the various situations that can arise. Such as the party, who was at fault lying about having auto insurance at the scene, protecting your right (as a financially responsible individual) with DMV, assisting through the car rental process, negotiating with the insurance company on vehicle replacement, medical bills and potential settlements. I was injured and couldn’t not have survived the mental ordeal of dealing with ALL the aspects of this unexpected situation. I highly recommend Penney & Associates because you need a reputable firm solidly on your side. Bottomline, they are simply the BEST!

A driver at fault in a serious car accident involving my daughter and myself had a policy with the minimum amount of car insurance coverage. Penny & Associates made sure the settlement was sufficient to cover all of our expenses and was 10 times the amount the insurance company originally offered us. Penny & Associates was able to settle the matter quickly and efficiently. We are grateful for the personal care each member of the firm extended us during what was a very difficult time.

Garrett Penney represented me legally with sincerity, honesty, respect, and excellent professionalism. He resolved my case successfully, and I sincerely recommend him because I am sure he would work hard for you.
Such a kind group, really want to thank you so much for the hospitality!

Kevin Elder is who you want in your corner! Kevin and his associate, Garrett, were the reason we won my medical malpractice case. Kevin works tirelessly to make sure every rock is turned over and he knows your case inside and out. I was routinely told by his peers and even competitors that he is the best person to have by your side. I would never look anywhere else for representation - Kevin is the best you could ever ask for.

After my wife and I were in a car accident, I knew we needed a lawyer we could trust. We turned to Penney & Associates because of their stellar reputation. It was the best decision we could have made. Garrett Penney represented us throughout our case. He was attentive to every detail and advocated for us throughout the process. I highly recommend Penney & Associates!

Hiring Kent Luckey with Penny and Associates was the best decision made! He was a very experienced attorney, that displayed excellent professionalism and understood how handle my personal case. He was always available and willing to answer any questions with a rapid response.Kent is an aggressive attorney that will work hard for you.

My mom was hit by car, we have no idea where to start or what to do next. Kent L. Walked us through the whole process and kept checking on my mom’s health every week. He has taken special care and extra steps to make sure she gets what she needs and deserves. Thanks Penney & Associates, but special thanks and kuddos to Kent Luckey… You rock!

Seth was great. Definitely put my mind at ease. I always felt like he was looking out for me and my best interest. I had the pleasure of speaking with some of the other team members, whom were also very genuine and helpful. Highly recommend.
Lindsay
Very knowledgeable and professional. I would and do recommend them to everyone I know!

Better late then never. In 2012 I was involved in an accident and Penney and Associates welcomed me with open arms treated me with so much respect and made sure I wouldn't worry about anything except getting well. Very happy with there work. I hope I'm never in a situation where I need a lawyer but if I do I can count on them to be there if I do. Hands down the nicest people

I went through a very painful and traumatizing car accident experience a couple years back, thankfully I had the right mind to bring my case to the caring lawyers and team at Penney & Associates. They were so thoughtful, diligent, and hard-working. Seth was the attorney working on my case and I am so thankful for all of the effort and hard-work he put into it. I truly believe that you all made my painful, uncomfortable experience much less daunting and overwhelming. Needless to say, I highly recommend Penney and Associates. Thank you so unbelievably much.
Seth was my attorney at Penny and Associate's and the representation was great as were the results Thanks Seth
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you David, we are so lucky to have Seth Madden on our team! Glad you had a great experience.

reviews.text: Thank you so much for all you do.  You made a, not so fun, situation much more manageable.  Thank you for helping me navigate through a difficult time.  I highly recommend Penney and Associates.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dee it was our pleasure to serve you! Thanks so much for the kind review. :D
Thank you for the stars Scott!!

reviews.text: From the first time I called this office until my case settled, I received nothing but the best service. I worked with Will Ramey and he made the process very smooth and explained everything very well. I never had a question he couldn't answer. I had to give a deposition. I had never given one before and I was quite anxious. Will not only calmed my fears, but he made everything very clear to me. He reassured me through the process and all the way through to the end. I hope I never need Will again, but he will be the first person I call if I do!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Sarah. It means a lot to us that you are happy with how we successfully handled your case. Yes, hopefully you won't need us again but if there is anything you need, we are here for you!

reviews.text: Kent Luckey was very knowledgeable about my daughter's case and kept us informed of any updates at all times. He is very good at explaining things. I highly recommend this firm and I will be using their services for future legal needs.

Gratitude!
Looks like you forgot the other 3 stars! Wish we knew why you weren't completely happy. If there is anything we can do to earn full stars we want to know!

reviews.text:
When my good friend Laura's husband was critically injured in a motorcycle accident that was not his fault, I knew she needed a lawyer.
I didn't hesitate to give her Fred Penney's number, because I know he and his experienced team would fight for her like no other personal injury attorney. She has told me how pleased she and her husband are. Their attorney from Penney and Associates came to their house and took care of everything. She is awaiting a settlement. I would not refer my family and friends to anyone else. Fred Penney is the best if you need someone willing to fight for you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Patty, thank you so much! We so enjoyed working with Laura. We are so happy that we can help such wonderful people get through their difficult times.

reviews.text:
I had the privilege of having Don latzer represent me throughout a long and difficult divorce that lasted over six years. This was a high-conflict case involving both child custody and complex financial settlements.

From the very beginning, Don showed not only exceptional professionalism but also genuine kindness and empathy. He was always responsive and responsible, never overcharging me for his time — in fact, on a few occasions, he even gave me discounts on his fees, which I deeply appreciated.

When it came to child custody, his guidance went beyond legal advice. He offered me personal support and made sure that my Kid's best interests were always protected. At the same time, he conducted himself in a way that ensured the other party never felt treated unfairly, which speaks volumes about his integrity and character.

What stood out most to me is that he truly cares about his clients as people. Even after the divorce and settlements were finalized, he continues to check in on me, making sure I’m doing well. Over time, our relationship has grown beyond attorney and client — we have become good friends, and I respect him greatly not just as a lawyer, but as a human being.

I cannot recommend Don Latzer enough. If you’re looking for someone who is knowledgeable, compassionate, fair, and deeply committed to his clients, he is the attorney you want by your side.

I highly recommend Mr Don Latzer he Provided Exceptional legal support and guidance throughout my case. His professional, attention to detail, and compassionate approach made difficult situation much easier to navigate, Mr.Don Latzer was alway responsive, thorough,andtruly had my best interests interest at heart. If you're looking for a knowledgeable and dedicated family and divorce lawyer I wouldn't hesitate to recommend him. I don't want to forget that i was always treated like family.

THANK YOU, THANK YOU,
THANK YOU 🕊️🤗

I have known Don for approximately 20 years.  Over that time he proven to be utmost professional.

Don is ethical and reasonable.  He knows the law, always has a firm grasp of the facts.

He approaches each case with compassion, commonsense, and always keeps his client’s interests and well being at the forefront.

Retaining Don Latzer is your first step toward a fair, and equitable, resolution to your case and stability in your life.

Don Latzer is a knowledgeable attorney.  He has the ability to cut through complex matters and extract the most important details to effectuate resolution.  He will litigate when necessary and strives to achieve the best results for his clients.
Hasnt done his job and didnt file important paperwork on time. Also went against his own client taking the other side prolonging the divorce and screwing over his own client.  Horrible attorney.
Don navigated a complicated custody situation for me and got me a great outcome.  I would 100% recommend his services.
I would recommend using Mr. Latzer. He was very kind and knowledgeable. He handled my husbands case with ease.
Fantastic Representaion for our daughter!

I would advise using Donald Latzer as a family law attorney. We have used his services for the past 5 years. He was recommended to us by another attorney who we wanted to use, but weren't able to. He has been compassionate, reasonably priced and through.  He has also been very  quick to respond to my emails and phone calls when necessary.

Extremely unprofessional!
Made the mistake of rushing to hire an attorney, found Mr. Latzer's 5 star rating and thought the reviews were reliable.  The photo is sadly what I was given when my payment was taken...no actual copy of my Retainer Agreement EVER received even after MULTIPLE requests!

All Mr. Latzer was able to provide was some initial consultation and completing two FL forms...had to badger him to complete the forms as he had no regard for the deadline when he knew I had already been served weeks prior!

Had to stay on him or my paperwork would not have made it to the courts on time.  I ended up hiring a new attorney (another $3,500) in which case my new attorney immediately provided her rates and a retainer agreement up front, leaving nothing to be unsure about with her new representation.  Sadly Mr. Latzer could not even sign over the Substitution of Attorney form in a timely manner after the new law group made several requests.
Please don't waste your money or risk the custody of your child!!!!

Don't waste your money with Mr latzer. Seek out professional help. He charges you $3,500 to steal your money. He then will ignore emails and phone calls that you make to him. He is unprofessional, lazy and not worth your time or your money. He is a horrible lawyer and very unprofessional.

Don Latzer has been an amazing attorney. He is professional and conducts himself appropriately, knows what to say and is very quick to respond in court. He has helped me tremendously through a very aggressive/ bitter ex spouse and continues to work his magic and make miracles happen!

Mr Latzer said he saw my ex husband go into a courtroom, so he went in to see what was going on. He said it was with CSS. I asked if I should have been there. He said no, it was between my ex and CSS. He told me that my child support ended up being set to $0 as of the ruling that day. He told me I had no recourse on that. 10 years later I went before a judge to say how disappointed I was with the legal system, that a highly educated man (my ex) wouldn't have to pay any support. Judge told me that I was supposed to be there that day, and Latzer was there representing me, but I didn't show up. Latzer lied to me, and he could have set a new court date that day and didn't. I got shafted  big time by him and lost 10 years of child support for three children. I opened a case with the bar, but I have no written proof of what really happened that day. We became homeless and didn't need to be.  Is that the kind of attorney you want??
Mr. Latzer is a knowledgeable family law attorney. I have had the pleasure of assiting his firm with difficult serves. I strongly recommend Latzer & Fleming firm in the greater Sacramento Area.

Don is a great family law attorney.  He is compassionate as well as an aggressive advocate on his clients' behalf.  I had the pleasure of working with Don many years ago as his paralegal.  I am familiar with family law attorneys in the greater Sacramento area and Don is the attorney to whom I refer clients. I strongly recommend Latzer & Fleming.
He’s been great. He’s has listened, offered advice and walked me through the process.

Not only is he a great attorney but he is caring and personable....he took all the stress off and made me feel
not only cared for but safe in his care. Thank you for your services
Donald was always there, helping me through a taxing time in life.

Mr Latzer does great work. He is a little unorthodox when you meet with him in his office and not like most lawyers I have met, but the results are all that matter. He managed to straighten out the custody issues and saved me a fortune doing it. He is a bulldog in the court room and will fight tooth and nail for those he represents. I will recommend him to anyone I meet going through divorce.
Knew what he was doing and was effective.  Helped through a difficult patch in life.

Most awful experience ever!!!Mr.Latzer is the kind of attorneygj who makes you want to avoid attorneys like a plague. I came to him for what was supposed to be free consultation, but which ended up costing me $1500. I felt manipulated and taken advantage of. At the time when I saw him, I was going through some very rough time and it did  occur to me to report him to California Bar Association. Thinking back on that awful experience, I wish I did.

Awful. Don is extremely rude. I would have to call multiple times before he would return my call or give me any information regarding my case. He told me that he sent the paperwork to the other party and he didn't know why it was taking so long. He finally admitted that he never sent the paperwork three weeks prior, like he said he did. He is a waste of time. Trust me, DO NOT HIRE HIM!
Great team top to bottom

Ms. Baker and her team thoroughly vetted my personal needs surrounding my particular situation and were able to come up with a very solid Will & Trust accustomed to those needs all the while showing compassion.  I'm now a repeat client ❤️

Elise did our Trust and was and am very happy with the service we received. She also works Sundays, so making follow up apointments is really easy. Her office is on Stanford Ranch Road just off Highway 65 so very easy and convenient to get to. Low key, very thoughtful, very relaxed.  Highly recommended!

I was referred to this firm by a close friend after my accident.  I called as soon as I was released from the hospital. Mahul asked me a couple of questions and I sent a couple of documents.  After that, I didn't have to do anything.  I was never contacted by the insurance company.  Mahul took care of all of that. He would check in to see how my recovery was going and he always responded to emails within 10 minutes of me sending one.  The firm was able to get me the maximum settlement allowed and I never felt like I was left in the dark.  You will not see a lot of commercials from this firm like you do others.  When word of mouth is your best advertising, you provide the highest quality service.  I can't thank Mahul enough for making this process so painless for me.

I never write reviews for many reasons as the opinions and compliments are never read with an open mind. As readers many of us failed to see the tone of the writer and we take the opinions to gauge our decisions. The writer is often attacking the organization and/or the people/person or both who has tried their best to help us with their knowledge and experiences but we failed to see from their perspectives as well that is what has this person been through when we encountered them or spoke with them.  In my opinion writer's should focus on their experience and be in a clear state of mind when they writing reviews.

Justin Gingery, Esq. is amazing!!! He's compassionate, understanding and respectful of one's wishes and concerns. He understands and respect the background of his clients as some cultures are not pro-western medicine their focus is more holistic and eastern medicine that he always reminds the clients to discuss their care with the medical providers. He answers all my questions  and concerns and takes all my calls to which gives me complete comfort and relief that all I did was focused on my health and treatments so that I resume life as best I could to what it was pre-accident. Most PI attorneys are focused on pushing care onto their clients to maximize the recovery but not Justin. His concern the well being on the clients (me). You get the feeling and sense that you are family. There is truly nothing negative anyone could say about Mr. Gingery in my opinion!!  I send all my families, friends and so forth to Justin and his partner Jeff Hammer, Esq.

Jeffery Hammer, Esq. is also equally amazing as well!! He answers all my questions and concerns as well. And just like his partner Justin both attorneys makes you feel like family and at ease so I can focus on my care.

The staff are great.

I could have not ask for a better legal team on my case!! Thank you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your thoughtful review and for sharing your experience with Justin and Jeff. We’re thrilled to hear that you felt cared for and supported throughout your journey. Your feedback emphasizes the compassion and dedication we strive to provide to all our clients. We appreciate your trust in us and your willingness to recommend our team to family and friends. It’s wonderful to know that we could assist you in focusing on your health and recovery.

reviews.text: Don’t listen to any negative reviews. Just people being people. This law firm is fantastic! Any time I called they answered and actually seemed to care about my case. I would HIGHLY recommend this firm
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your positive feedback, Shawn! We're thrilled to hear that you had a fantastic experience with our team. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we'll continue to strive to provide exceptional service to all our clients.

reviews.text: Jeff and team are phenomenal. They were very responsive, and stayed on top of things until the very last step. I highly recommend them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Praneeth! We’re thrilled to hear that you found our team responsive and helpful throughout the process. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we appreciate your support. Looking forward to assisting you again in the future!

Almost two years ago, I was involved in a really bad accident that I was lucky to walk away from with minor life changing injuries.
This being my first major accident, I was terrified in what to do, how I should proceed in the situation, or if getting a personal injury lawyer was worth it.
Well, let's just say, hiring Dan Schneiderman as my personal injury lawyer was the best decision.
He actually cares and fights for YOU to get you what you rightfully deserve.
He's keeps you well informed on anything that in transpiring, whether it's through email, text, or calls; always reachable.
I would just like to thank Dan, Tierra, and the entire gingery law firm again for helping me!  😊
very blessed to be represented by this law firm. very blessed.

I was in a car that was hit by another car, causing a back injury and much stress. I was referred to Personal Injury attorney, Thomas Gray.
My first meeting with Mr. Gray calmed me down and made me feel extremely secure in my choice for an attorney. Over time, I found Thomas to be hard working, intelligent and very knowledgeable of the law. More importantly, I was treated with tremendous respect. Throughout this process, Thomas always kept me informed of the status of my case, and emails or phone calls were always returned the same day.
Ultimately, and most importantly, Thomas came through above and beyond anything I could have ever imagined. I was ultimately awarded the maximum amount of liability of the insurance policy of the opposing party.
I am writing this review for only one reason. It's my hope that others who are going through the pain and stress of an accident, and are unsure of who to retain as a Personal Injury attorney like I was, would consider retaining Thomas Gray. The choice that you make for an attorney could be one of the most important choices you will ever make in your life.
Nice people good customer service, they explain everything to you, they are professional
Amazing firm! They keep you in touch every step of thr way. They fought for me as I was in a car accident with injuries. I would recommend my friends and family to them with out thinking twice!

reviews.text:
I've used Gingery law firm twice now.  Both Jeffery Hammer and Justin Gingery have been amazing!  They have been there to help me every step of the way.  I don't know if you have ever had to call a law firm before.  Most you seem to talk to a "Case Manager"...  This is incredibly frustrating.   I HAVE NEVER HAD TO TALK TO A CASE MANAGER with GINGERY LAW FIRM!  The 2 or 3 times I needed to talk to their paralegal Jessica was even amazing.  She is a crucial part of the team! Any time I had questions or concerns I have spoken directly to Jeff or Justin.  They are always able to help and return calls promptly.  I am I loyal customer for life! I can not give this team enough praise!  I want to signal out both Justin and Jeff!  They have gone above and beyond to make me feel like they are not in it for the paycheck, but there to help me get through the pain and suffering and to see a brighter future on the horizon!

I really hope they both get a chance to read this.  You entire team, from the receptionist, to Jessica, to you have given me hope for a brighter future!

Sincerely Luke!
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow, Luke! Thank you so much for the amazing review. We are truly honored that you have chosen our team not once, but twice to help with your cases. You've been great to work with. I'm excited to share this with the whole team. You are right, they are all crucial parts of our team and we couldn't do it without them. Thank you!

reviews.text: A+ 5 STARS After the sudden departure of our initial lawyer, we were shuffled around the firm and ended up with a very competent and hard working match: Jeffrey Hammer is wonderful and a true pleasure to work with.  Unfortunately records were lost in the transition and re-acquiting medical records was a nightmare (fortunately they credited the records fee). They ultimately settled on the lowest end of what we were willing to take. We received little to no hep with liens and the award was a pittance of what we settled for. Given all the issues more considerations should of been made. I'm just glad to finally put this besides me. I would recommend avoiding lawsuits as much as possible. That said, if necessary, there is no better place to.put your trust.

Excellent Employment Law attorney and team! Jeff is very knowledgeable and very good at distilling complex topics into easily understood information. I am grateful to have met and worked with Jeff and his wonderful paralegal, Brandy. Jeff is a skilled and capable trial lawyer with winning attitude and work ethic. I really appreciated the professionalism and honesty from Fulton’s office. Mr. Fulton took the time to review my case carefully, explained things clearly, and was upfront about the realities instead of overpromising. Even though he couldn’t move forward, I felt heard and treated with respect. I’d recommend his office to anyone looking for straightforward, ethical legal guidance.

Thank you Jeff and Bandy, you’ve been a great help.

Although they were unable to help me with my case the advice I got here was still very helpful.

I had the privilege of working with Jeffrey Fulton and Brandy, and I can’t recommend them enough. From the very beginning, they were compassionate, professional, and genuinely attentive to my concerns. Brandy was incredibly responsive and supportive throughout the process, and Jeffrey provided clear, honest, and straightforward guidance that gave me peace of mind. They truly take the time to listen, explain, and advocate on your behalf. If you’re looking for an employment law team that combines deep expertise with genuine care for their clients, Fulton Law Corporation is the place to go.

Jeffrey Fulton is an incredible human being with A LOT of experience. The thing that I loved the most about talking to him and working with him is his educated and experienced "no-BS-real-life" approach while delivering it with a ton of empathy, support and understanding. This is the man that you want on your side.
Brandy, his paralegal is such a kind caring person too, and really makes you feel "heard" and valued when you call for the intake appointment. Her communication is professional, empathetic and to the point. I loved talking with her as much as I did with Jeffrey. These are the people you want to work with.
Doesn't help you for small cases. Only cares about money.

I had a defamation case where my former employer was deliberately providing false and misleading information about my employment background to a potential new employer. I reached out to several employment lawyers, and Brandy was the first to respond. She was kind, responsive, and got me scheduled within just a few hours.

I met with Jeffrey for a consultation and expected it to be a quick meeting where I’d be told to hire him and pay before anything was even reviewed. I was very pleasantly surprised. He had already reviewed all of my documents beforehand, came prepared with a folder of notes and highlights, and spent an hour and a half carefully going over every detail of my case. He truly took the time to listen, take notes, and understand my story.

At no point did he rush me or pressure me into hiring him. Instead, he clearly laid out my options, including waiting to see if the situation would resolve on its own. He was transparent about his rates, explained legal terms in a way I could understand, and provided helpful resources and guidance for moving forward.

Thankfully, the situation was resolved without needing legal action. Jeffrey was incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and supportive throughout the entire process. Brandy was equally wonderful and made everything easy and stress-free. I never felt pressured to spend money, but would definitely hire Jeffrey if I needed to. I highly recommend this team to anyone dealing with employment-related legal concerns.

I had the privilege of working with Mr. Fulton on my case, and I couldn't be more satisfied with the service provided. From the very beginning, Mr. Fulton and his team stood out by genuinely listening to my concerns when nobody else would. He took the time to understand the nuances of my situation and provided thoughtful, expert guidance every step of the way.

Mr. Fulton demonstrated exceptional legal acumen, consistently offering clear and sound advice that made a significant difference in the outcome of my case. He and his teams dedication, attention to detail, and unwavering commitment to my best interests were evident throughout the process.

Thanks to Mr. Fulton's expertise and support, I felt confident and well-represented. His professionalism and compassionate approach made a challenging situation much more manageable.

I highly recommend Fulton Law Corporation to anyone in need of legal assistance.

You will be in excellent hands.

The experience was seamless; I could handle everything digitally, and my involvement was minimal, which was incredibly convenient given my hectic schedule.

Overall, I highly recommend Paul. He is not only knowledgeable and kind but also highly responsive. Furthermore, his expertise is instrumental in maximizing your payout.

I reached out to the Arrasmith firm due to a stressful tenant landlord conflict. It was difficult to find a firm that specialized in assisting tenants, as most firms I contacted work exclusively for landlords.

I paid for a consultation call for which the consulting attorney (Mr. Benavides) had clearly prepared in advance. He had clearly read everything I had supplied to his legal secretary and came to the call with a ready game plan. He informed me of my tenant rights, the landlord’s legal obligations and constraints, and the options at my disposal. He went over what the firm could do to achieve any number of goals in alignment with my needs and preferences. After the call I chose to contract the firm for representation.

I am really glad that I did. Mr. Arrasmith and his team of paralegals worked on my case continuously for several months, communicating on my behalf and running interference when my virulently spiteful landlord attempted to exact revenge for dare being asked to fulfill her basic professional obligations without wilding out like a feral goblin. While I was bracing for a protracted and costly court battle, the legal team successfully avoided that expense by engaging direct communications with the landlord’s lawyer, striking a professional but strong tone appropriate for the situation. It turned out to be an effective style.

The landlord ended up retracting her retaliation attempts and the situation seems to have settled now for the last few months. Some reviews note that costs can run up quickly, and this is true so I recommend clear communication with the legal team and billing department from early on. Legal fees are a usual concern with any attorney representation, especially with a bigger firm. The firm was flexible with me and updated me promptly with transparent billing. I found the paralegal team to be really responsive and explanatory. Mr. Arrasmith himself was quick to respond, even off hours.

I think it is really important for tenants to have strong advocacy in their corner because some landlords try to throw their weight around and overextend their power simply because they can – or they think they can. It is good when firms like Arrasmith can get involved to remind overreaching landlords that they are not above the law just because they have petty inflated egos. I would contract this firm again if I needed legal representation in the future.
Super chill experience, got all my questions answered. They did their thing and made it easy peasy. Highly recommend! 😎
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you, Yasir Farooq, for your 5-star review. We are pleased to hear that your questions were addressed and that your experience with our team was smooth and efficient. Your recommendation is greatly appreciated.

-The Law Offices of James L. Arrasmith

reviews.text:
I hired The Law Offices of James L. Arrasmith to help with a security deposit dispute with a former landlord. Initially, things went very well. They quickly scheduled me for a consultation with Michael, who made me feel heard and reassured. After I signed a retainer agreement, they moved promptly to gather information about my case and draft a demand letter.

However, communication broke down after that. I never received confirmation that the letter had been sent. When the response deadline passed, I reached out for an update and waited about a week for a reply. I was told they had modified the response deadline (apparently because the letter hadn’t gone out as planned) and to give it more time.

When the new deadline passed, I again had to reach out for updates. I was told they hadn’t heard back from my landlord and would try emailing the letter. Once again, I didn’t hear anything further until I followed up myself. They suggested waiting another week and then possibly filing if there was still no response. When I asked, multiple times, to discuss what filing would involve, I didn’t receive a response. After two weeks without communication, I decided to end my representation, as I was concerned they wouldn’t be proactive or responsive enough to resolve the matter effectively.

I do appreciate that they produced a well-written demand letter and that Mr. Arrasmith personally reviewed it. My final invoice also showed a recommendation to proceed with filing, though that was never actually communicated to me. The next lawyer I hired brought things to a conclusion very quickly, but I feel like the money I spent with Mr. Arrasmith was wasted because that lawyer had to repeat a lot of the same work and draft a new demand letter. Overall, I felt I had to do the follow-up work myself to keep the case moving, and their lack of communication ultimately made me lose trust in their services.

Called them about a housing dispute that had been dragging on for months. They stepped in and changed everything. Super responsive, straightforward advice, and real results. They made something messy feel manageable, and thats worth every star.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Your kind words mean a great deal to all of us at The Law Offices of James L. Arrasmith.
